Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.19.0+0.19.3. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
A minimal, reference formalization of Staged Specification Logic for Verifying Higher-Order Imperative Programs (FM 2024). 
From Coq Require Import Classes.RelationClasses.
From Coq Require Morphisms Program.Basics.

(* remove when https://github.com/coq/coq/pull/19673 is merged *)
Set Warnings "-notation-incompatible-prefix".

[Loading ML file ring_plugin.cmxs (using legacy method) ... done]
[Loading ML file zify_plugin.cmxs (using legacy method) ... done]
[Loading ML file micromega_plugin.cmxs (using legacy method) ... done]
[Loading ML file btauto_plugin.cmxs (using legacy method) ... done]


Could not enable unknown warning
notation-incompatible-prefix [unknown-warning,default]

From Staged Require Export LibFmap.
From Staged Require Export ExtraTactics.

Local Open Scope string_scope.
(* Local Open Scope nat_scope. *)
Local Open Scope Z_scope.
Local Open Scope list_scope.

Set Implicit Arguments.

Programs

The representation of programs and the use of substitution are mostly reused from SLF. 
Definition var : Type := string.
Definition var_eq := String.string_dec.

Definition loc := nat.

Inductive val :=
  | vunit : val
  | vint : Z -> val
  | vfun : var -> expr -> val
  | vfix : var -> var -> expr -> val
  | vloc : loc -> val
  | vtup : val -> val -> val
  | vstr : string -> val
  | vbool : bool -> val
  | vlist : list val -> val

with expr : Type :=
  | pvar (x: var)
  | pval (v: val)
  | plet (x: var) (e1 e2: expr)
  | pfix (f: var) (x: var) (e: expr)
  | pfun (x: var) (e: expr)
  | padd (x y: expr)
  | pfst (t: expr)
  | psnd (t: expr)
  | pminus (x y: expr)
  | passert (b: expr)
  | pref (v: expr)
  | pderef (v: expr)
  | passign (x: expr) (v: expr)
  | pif (b: expr) (e1: expr) (e2: expr)
  | papp (x: expr) (a: expr).


Inhab val


Inhab val

  
exists _ : val, True

  
True

  constructor.
Qed.

Fixpoint subst (y:var) (w:val) (e:expr) : expr :=
  let aux t := subst y w t in
  let if_y_eq x t1 t2 := if var_eq x y then t1 else t2 in
  match e with
  | pval v => pval v
  | padd x y => padd x y
  | pminus x y => pminus x y
  | pfst x => pfst x
  | psnd x => psnd x
  | pvar x => if_y_eq x (pval w) e
  | passert b => passert b
  | pderef r => pderef r
  | passign x y => passign x y
  | pref v => pref v
  | pfun x t1 => pfun x (if_y_eq x t1 (aux t1))
  | pfix f x t1 => pfix f x (if_y_eq f t1 (if_y_eq x t1 (aux t1)))
  | papp e v => papp e v
  | plet x t1 t2 => plet x (aux t1) (if_y_eq x t2 (aux t2))
  | pif t0 t1 t2 => pif t0 (aux t1) (aux t2)
  end.

Module Val.
  Definition value := val.
End Val.
SLF's heap theory as a functor. 
Module Export Heap := HeapF.HeapSetup Val.

Definition empty_heap : heap := Fmap.empty.

Definition precond := hprop.
Definition postcond := val -> hprop.

Inductive result : Type :=
  | norm : val -> result.

Staged formulae

Deeply embedded due to uninterpreted functions, which cannot immediately be given a semantics without an environment. If we make flow a function of an senv, the type of flow will be flow : (var → (val → val → flow)) → ... → Prop, which cannot be defined. 
Inductive flow :=
  | req : precond -> flow -> flow
  | ens : postcond -> flow
  | seq : flow -> flow -> flow
  | fex : forall A, (A -> flow) -> flow
  | fall : forall A, (A -> flow) -> flow
  | unk : var -> val -> val -> flow
  | intersect : flow -> flow -> flow
  | disj : flow -> flow -> flow.
An ens which doesn't have a useful return value. This carries more information than ens (fun _ ⇒ H), which has an arbitrary return value.
In practice, it is much easier to use this to talk about results which are universally quantified externally; the result of a staged formula is mainly useful only for defining its semantics and in triples.
Consequently, key lemmas like norm_ens_req_transpose are defined using this. This can to some extent be considered an implementation deficiency around the use of HOAS. 
Definition ens_ H := ens (fun r => \[r = vunit] \* H).

Definition empty := ens_ \[True].

Notation req_ H := (req H empty).
Function environments, for interpreting unknown functions. ufun is a HOAS way of substituting into a staged formula, which otherwise doesn't support this due to the shallow embedding that hprop uses. 
Definition ufun := val -> val -> flow.
Definition senv := Fmap.fmap var (option ufun).

Definition empty_env : senv := Fmap.empty.

Declare Scope flow_scope.
Open Scope flow_scope.

Infix ";;" := seq (at level 38, right associativity) : flow_scope.

Notation "'∃' x1 .. xn , H" :=
  (fex (fun x1 => .. (fex (fun xn => H)) ..))
  (at level 39, x1 binder, H at level 50, right associativity,
   format "'[' '∃' '/ '  x1  ..  xn , '/ '  H ']'") : flow_scope.

Notation "'∀' x1 .. xn , H" :=
  (fall (fun x1 => .. (fall (fun xn => H)) ..))
  (at level 39, x1 binder, H at level 50, right associativity,
   format "'[' '∀' '/ '  x1  ..  xn , '/ '  H ']'") : flow_scope.

Notation "f '$' '(' x ',' r ')'" := (unk f x r)
  (at level 80, format "f '$' '(' x ','  r ')'", only printing) : flow_scope.

(* Notation "'ens' '[' r ']' Q" := (ens (fun r => Q))
  (at level 80, format "'ens' '\[' r '\]' Q" , only printing) : flow_scope. *)
(* square brackets will conflict with format notation for boxes https://coq.inria.fr/doc/V8.20.0/refman/user-extensions/syntax-extensions.html#displaying-symbolic-notations:~:text=well%2Dbracketed%20pairs%20of%20tokens%20of%20the%20form%20%27%5B%20%27%20and%20%27%5D%27 *)

Notation "'ens' r '.' Q" := (ens (fun r => Q))
  (at level 80, format "'ens'  r '.'  Q" , only printing) : flow_scope.

(* Some tests *)

(* Check (fex (fun x => ens_ \[x = vint 1];; empty)).
Check (fex (fun x => ens_ \[x = vint 1]);; empty).
Check (req \[] (ens_ \[];; empty)).
Check (ens_ \[];; req \[] empty). *)

Interpretation of a staged formula

An Inductive definition is used because the rule for unknown functions is not structurally recursive. 
Inductive satisfies : senv -> heap -> heap -> result -> flow -> Prop :=

  | s_req env p (h1 h2:heap) r f
    (H: forall (hp hr:heap), (* the heap satisfying p, and the remaining heap *)
      p hp ->
      h1 = Fmap.union hr hp ->
      Fmap.disjoint hr hp ->
      satisfies env hr h2 r f) :
    satisfies env h1 h2 r (req p f)

  | s_ens env q h1 h2 r
    (H: exists v h3,
      r = norm v /\
      q v h3 /\
      h2 = Fmap.union h1 h3 /\
      Fmap.disjoint h1 h3) :
    satisfies env h1 h2 r (ens q)

  | s_seq env f1 f2 h1 h2 r
    (H: exists h3 r1,
      satisfies env h1 h3 r1 f1 /\
      satisfies env h3 h2 r f2) :
    satisfies env h1 h2 r (seq f1 f2)

  | s_fex env h1 h2 r (A:Type) (f:A->flow)
    (H: exists v,
      satisfies env h1 h2 r (f v)) :
    satisfies env h1 h2 r (@fex A f)

  | s_fall env h1 h2 r (A:Type) (f:A->flow)
    (H: forall v,
      satisfies env h1 h2 r (f v)) :
    satisfies env h1 h2 r (@fall A f)

  | s_unk env h1 h2 r fn f x
    (He: Fmap.read env fn = Some f)
    (Hr: satisfies env h1 h2 (norm r) (f x r)) :
    satisfies env h1 h2 (norm r) (unk fn x r)

  | s_intersect env h1 h2 r f1 f2
    (H1: satisfies env h1 h2 r f1)
    (H2: satisfies env h1 h2 r f2) :
    satisfies env h1 h2 r (intersect f1 f2)

  | s_disj_l env h1 h2 r f1 f2
    (H: satisfies env h1 h2 r f1) :
    satisfies env h1 h2 r (disj f1 f2)

  | s_disj_r env h1 h2 r f1 f2
    (H: satisfies env h1 h2 r f2) :
    satisfies env h1 h2 r (disj f1 f2).

Notation "env ','  h1 ','  h2 ','  r  '|=' f" :=
  (satisfies env h1 h2 r f) (at level 30, only printing).
The result of a staged formula, written in the paper as Φ[r]. Because it relates a formula and a value here (and not a variable, as in the paper), we need a model for the formula to talk about the value. 
Definition flow_res (f:flow) (v:val) : Prop :=
  forall h1 h2 env v1, satisfies env h1 h2 (norm v1) f -> v1 = v.

Definition flow_res_in_env (f:flow) (v:val) env : Prop :=
  forall h1 h2 v1, satisfies env h1 h2 (norm v1) f -> v1 = v.

Definition has_no_result f :=
  forall env h1 h2 r, satisfies env h1 h2 r f -> r = norm vunit.

Entailment

This sequent is useful for (interactive) proofs involving functions. 
Definition entails_under env f1 f2 :=
  forall h1 h2 r,
    satisfies env h1 h2 r f1 -> satisfies env h1 h2 r f2.

(* see [ent_unk_conv] for why there is no bientails_under *)
General entailments which work for arbitrary environments. 
Definition entails (f1 f2:flow) : Prop :=
  forall env h1 h2 r, satisfies env h1 h2 r f1 -> satisfies env h1 h2 r f2.

Definition bientails (f1 f2:flow) : Prop :=
  forall h1 h2 r env,
    satisfies env h1 h2 r f1 <-> satisfies env h1 h2 r f2.

Infix "⊑" := entails (at level 90, right associativity) : flow_scope.

Notation "env '⊢' f1 '⊑' f2" :=
  (entails_under env f1 f2) (at level 90, only printing) : flow_scope.

Top and bottom

Definition top := req \[False] (ens_ \[True]).
Definition bot := req \[True] (ens_ \[False]).
Definition error := req \[False] (ens_ \[False]).
Definition post_sat (Q:postcond) := exists v h, Q v h.
Definition flow_sat f := exists s h1 h2 r, satisfies s h1 h2 r f.
Definition okay P Q := ens_ \[post_sat Q];; req P (ens Q).

(* Unset Printing Notations. Set Printing Coercions. Set Printing Parentheses. *)
(* Check (forall f1 f2 f3, f1 ;; f3 ⊑ f2). *)

Rewriting

Reflexive entails


Reflexive entails

  
forall (x : flow) (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= x -> env, h1, h2, r |= x

  
x: flow
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: env, h1, h2, r |= x
env, h1, h2, r |= x

  exact H.
Qed.


Transitive entails


Transitive entails

  
forall x y z : flow,
(forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= x -> env, h1, h2, r |= y) ->
(forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= y -> env, h1, h2, r |= z) ->
forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= x -> env, h1, h2, r |= z

  
x, y, z: flow
H: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= x -> env, h1, h2, r |= y
H0: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= y -> env, h1, h2, r |= z
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H1: env, h1, h2, r |= x
env, h1, h2, r |= z

  auto.
Qed.


PreOrder entails


PreOrder entails

  
Reflexive entails
Transitive entails

  
Transitive entails

  apply entails_trans.
Qed.


forall env : senv, Reflexive (entails_under env)


forall env : senv, Reflexive (entails_under env)

  
forall (env : senv) (x : flow) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= x -> env, h1, h2, r |= x

  
env: senv
x: flow
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: env, h1, h2, r |= x
env, h1, h2, r |= x

  exact H.
Qed.


forall env : senv, Transitive (entails_under env)


forall env : senv, Transitive (entails_under env)

  
forall (env : senv) (x y z : flow),
(forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= x -> env, h1, h2, r |= y) ->
(forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= y -> env, h1, h2, r |= z) ->

env: senv
x, y, z: flow
H: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= x -> env, h1, h2, r |= y
H0: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= y -> env, h1, h2, r |= z
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H1: env, h1, h2, r |= x
env, h1, h2, r |= z

  auto.
Qed.


forall env : senv, PreOrder (entails_under env)


forall env : senv, PreOrder (entails_under env)

  
env: senv
Reflexive (entails_under env)
env: senv
Transitive (entails_under env)

  
env: senv
Transitive (entails_under env)

  apply entails_under_trans.
Qed.

forall x : flow, bientails x x

Infix "====>" := Morphisms.respectful (at level 80, right associativity).
Notation Proper := Morphisms.Proper.
Notation respectful := Morphisms.respectful.
Notation impl := Program.Basics.impl.
Notation flip := Basics.flip.
Incantations for setoid rewriting 
Section Proprium.
This reflects how entailment is contravariant in the antecedent and covariant in the consequent 
  
Proper
  (respectful (flip entails) (respectful entails impl))
  entails

  
Proper
  (respectful (flip entails) (respectful entails impl))
  entails

    
forall x y : flow,
flip
  (fun f1 f2 : flow =>
   forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
   env, h1, h2, r |= f1 -> env, h1, h2, r |= f2) x y ->
forall x0 y0 : flow,
(forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= x0 -> env, h1, h2, r |= y0) ->
(forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= x -> env, h1, h2, r |= x0) ->
forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= y -> env, h1, h2, r |= y0

    
x, y: flow
H: flip
  (fun f1 f2 : flow =>
   forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
   env, h1, h2, r |= f1 -> env, h1, h2, r |= f2) x
  y
x0, y0: flow
H0: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= x0 -> env, h1, h2, r |= y0
H1: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= x -> env, h1, h2, r |= x0
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H2: env, h1, h2, r |= y
env, h1, h2, r |= y0

    auto.
  Qed.

  
forall env : senv,
Proper
  (respectful (flip (entails_under env))
     (respectful (entails_under env) impl))
  (entails_under env)

  
forall env : senv,
Proper
  (respectful (flip (entails_under env))
     (respectful (entails_under env) impl))
  (entails_under env)

    
forall (env : senv) (x y : flow),
flip
  (fun f1 f2 : flow =>
   forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
   env, h1, h2, r |= f1 -> env, h1, h2, r |= f2) x y ->
forall x0 y0 : flow,
(forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= x0 -> env, h1, h2, r |= y0) ->
(forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= x -> env, h1, h2, r |= x0) ->
forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= y -> env, h1, h2, r |= y0

    
env: senv
x, y: flow
H: flip
  (fun f1 f2 : flow =>
   forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
   env, h1, h2, r |= f1 -> env, h1, h2, r |= f2) x
  y
x0, y0: flow
H0: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= x0 -> env, h1, h2, r |= y0
H1: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= x -> env, h1, h2, r |= x0
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H2: env, h1, h2, r |= y
env, h1, h2, r |= y0

    auto.
  Qed.

forall x y : senv,
x = y ->
forall x0 y0 : heap,
x0 = y0 ->
forall x1 y1 : heap,
x1 = y1 ->
forall x2 y2 : result,
x2 = y2 ->
forall x3 y3 : flow,
(forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= x3 -> env, h1, h2, r |= y3) ->
x, x0, x1, x2 |= x3 -> y, y0, y1, y2 |= y3

    
x, y: senv
H: x = y
x0, y0: heap
H0: x0 = y0
x1, y1: heap
H1: x1 = y1
x2, y2: result
H2: x2 = y2
x3, y3: flow
H3: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= x3 -> env, h1, h2, r |= y3
H4: x, x0, x1, x2 |= x3
y, y0, y1, y2 |= y3
 
y: senv
y0, y1: heap
y2: result
x3, y3: flow
H3: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= x3 -> env, h1, h2, r |= y3
H4: y, y0, y1, y2 |= x3
y, y0, y1, y2 |= y3

    auto.
  Qed.

forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (∃ xn, x xn) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= (∃ xn, y xn)

x, y: A -> flow
H: forall (a : A) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= x a -> env, h1, h2, r |= y a
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: A
H1: env, h1, h2, r |= x v
env, h1, h2, r |= x v

    assumption.
  Qed.

  
forall env : senv,
Proper
  (respectful (flip entails) (respectful entails impl))
  (entails_under env)

  
forall env : senv,
Proper
  (respectful (flip entails) (respectful entails impl))
  (entails_under env)

    
forall (env : senv) (x y : flow),
(forall (env0 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env0, h1, h2, r |= y -> env0, h1, h2, r |= x) ->
forall x0 y0 : flow,
(forall (env0 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env0, h1, h2, r |= x0 -> env0, h1, h2, r |= y0) ->
(forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= x -> env, h1, h2, r |= x0) ->
forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= y -> env, h1, h2, r |= y0

    
env: senv
x, y: flow
H: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= y -> env, h1, h2, r |= x
x0, y0: flow
H0: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= x0 -> env, h1, h2, r |= y0
H1: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= x -> env, h1, h2, r |= x0
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H2: env, h1, h2, r |= y
env, h1, h2, r |= y0

    eauto.
  Qed.

  (* For rewriting in the goal. Some of the flipped instances are for this purpose.
     Without them, we can only rewrite in the Coq or the staged context. *)
  
forall env : senv,
Proper
  (respectful entails
     (respectful (flip entails) (flip impl)))
  (entails_under env)

  
forall env : senv,
Proper
  (respectful entails
     (respectful (flip entails) (flip impl)))
  (entails_under env)

    
forall (env : senv) (x y : flow),
(forall (env0 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env0, h1, h2, r |= x -> env0, h1, h2, r |= y) ->
forall x0 y0 : flow,
(forall (env0 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env0, h1, h2, r |= y0 -> env0, h1, h2, r |= x0) ->
(forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= y -> env, h1, h2, r |= y0) ->
forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= x -> env, h1, h2, r |= x0

    
env: senv
x, y: flow
H: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= x -> env, h1, h2, r |= y
x0, y0: flow
H0: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= y0 -> env, h1, h2, r |= x0
H1: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= y -> env, h1, h2, r |= y0
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H2: env, h1, h2, r |= x
env, h1, h2, r |= x0

    eauto.
  Qed.

End Proprium.

Inversion/introduction lemmas

forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (H : hprop)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ H -> r = norm vunit


forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (H : hprop)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ H -> r = norm vunit

  
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
H: hprop
r: result
H0: env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ H
r = norm vunit

  
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
H: hprop
r: result
H0: exists (v : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value),
  r = norm v /\
  (\[v = vunit] \* H) h3 /\
  h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
r = norm vunit
 
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
H: hprop
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H1: r = norm v
H0: (\[v = vunit] \* H) h3
H2: h2 = h1 \u h3
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
r = norm vunit

  
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
H: hprop
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H1: r = norm v
H0: v = vunit /\ H h3
H2: h2 = h1 \u h3
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
r = norm vunit
 
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
H: hprop
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H1: r = norm v
H0: v = vunit
H3: H h3
H2: h2 = h1 \u h3
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
r = norm vunit

  congruence.
Qed.


forall (P : Prop) (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ \[P] ->
P /\ h1 = h2 /\ r = norm vunit


forall (P : Prop) (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ \[P] ->
P /\ h1 = h2 /\ r = norm vunit

  
P: Prop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ \[P]
P /\ h1 = h2 /\ r = norm vunit

  
P: Prop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: exists (v : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value),
  r = norm v /\
  (\[v = vunit] \* \[P]) h3 /\
  h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
P /\ h1 = h2 /\ r = norm vunit
 
P: Prop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H0: r = norm v
H: (\[v = vunit] \* \[P]) h3
H1: h2 = h1 \u h3
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
P /\ h1 = h2 /\ r = norm vunit

  
P: Prop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H0: r = norm v
H: v = vunit /\ \[P] h3
H1: h2 = h1 \u h3
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
P /\ h1 = h2 /\ r = norm vunit
 
P: Prop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H0: r = norm v
H2: v = vunit
H4: \[P] h3
H1: h2 = h1 \u h3
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
P /\ h1 = h2 /\ r = norm vunit

  
P: Prop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H0: r = norm v
H2: v = vunit
H4: P /\ h3 = Fmap.empty
H1: h2 = h1 \u h3
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
P /\ h1 = h2 /\ r = norm vunit
 
P: Prop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H0: r = norm v
H2: v = vunit
H: P
H5: h3 = Fmap.empty
H1: h2 = h1 \u h3
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
P /\ h1 = h2 /\ r = norm vunit
 
P: Prop
env: senv
h1: heap
H: P
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 Fmap.empty
P /\ h1 = h1 \u Fmap.empty /\ norm vunit = norm vunit

  intuition.
Qed.


forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= empty -> h1 = h2 /\ r = norm vunit


forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= empty -> h1 = h2 /\ r = norm vunit

env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ \[True] ->
h1 = h2 /\ r = norm vunit

r: result
H: env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ \[True]
h1 = h2 /\ r = norm vunit

  
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: True /\ h1 = h2 /\ r = norm vunit
h1 = h2 /\ r = norm vunit

  intuition.
Qed.


forall (env : senv) (h1 : heap),
env, h1, h1, norm vunit |= empty


forall (env : senv) (h1 : heap),
env, h1, h1, norm vunit |= empty

  
env: senv
h1: heap
env, h1, h1, norm vunit |= empty

  
env: senv
h1: heap
env, h1, h1, norm vunit
|= (ens r. \[r = vunit] \* \[True])

  
env: senv
h1: heap
exists (v : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value),
  norm vunit = norm v /\
  (\[v = vunit] \* \[True]) h3 /\
  h1 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3

  
env: senv
h1: heap
exists h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value,
  norm vunit = norm vunit /\
  (\[vunit = vunit] \* \[True]) h3 /\
  h1 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3

  
env: senv
h1: heap
norm vunit = norm vunit /\
(\[vunit = vunit] \* \[True]) empty_heap /\
h1 = h1 \u empty_heap /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 empty_heap

(\[vunit = vunit] \* \[True]) empty_heap

env: senv
h1: heap
True
env: senv
h1: heap
h1 = h1 \u empty_heap

  
env: senv
h1: heap
h1 = h1 \u empty_heap

  fmap_eq.
Qed.

h1 = h2

  \[] h3 /\ h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3

h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H0: r = norm v
H: \[] h3
H1: h2 = h1 \u h3
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3

v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value

H: h3 = Fmap.empty

h1 = h2

h1: heap
v: val
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 Fmap.empty
h1 = h1 \u Fmap.empty

Qed.

forall H : hprop, has_no_result (ens_ H)


forall H : hprop, has_no_result (ens_ H)

  
forall (H : hprop) (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ H -> r = norm vunit

  
H: hprop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H0: env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ H
r = norm vunit

  applys ens_void_inv H0.
Qed.

Some tactics

Ltac fdestr_rec H :=
  match type of H with
  | satisfies _ _ _ _ (fex (fun x => _)) => inverts H as H; destr H
  | satisfies _ _ _ _ (_ ;; _) => inverts H as H; destr H
  | satisfies _ _ _ _ (ens_ \[_]) => apply ens_void_pure_inv in H; destr H
  end.

Ltac fdestr_pat H pat :=
  match type of H with
  | satisfies _ _ _ _ (fex (fun x => _)) => inverts H as H; destruct H as pat
  | satisfies _ _ _ _ (_ ;; _) => inverts H as H; destruct H as pat
  | satisfies _ _ _ _ (ens_ \[_]) => apply ens_void_pure_inv in H; destruct H as pat
  end.
Use these on product-like things like sequencing, existentials, and ens 
Tactic Notation "fdestr" constr(H) := fdestr_rec H.
Tactic Notation "fdestr" constr(H) "as" simple_intropattern(pat) := fdestr_pat H pat.

Entailment and normalization rules

H2: False
H6: x0 = Fmap.empty

H5: h3 = x \u x0
H1: h2 = h1 \u h3
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
env, h1, h2, r |= f

  false.
Qed.

Qed.

env, h1, h2, r |= req \[False] (ens_ \[False])

r: result
H: env, h1, h2, r |= okay P Q
forall hp hr : heap,
\[False] hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> env, hr, h2, r |= ens_ \[False]
 
P: precond
Q: postcond
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: env, h1, h2, r |= okay P Q
hp, hr: heap
H0: \[False] hp
H1: h1 = hr \u hp
H2: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
env, hr, h2, r |= ens_ \[False]
 
P: precond
Q: postcond
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: env, h1, h2, r |= okay P Q
hp, hr: heap
H0: False
H3: hp = Fmap.empty
H1: h1 = hr \u hp
H2: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
env, hr, h2, r |= ens_ \[False]
 false.
Qed.


forall (P : precond) (Q : postcond), error ⊑ okay P Q


forall (P : precond) (Q : postcond), error ⊑ okay P Q

  
forall (P : precond) (Q : postcond) (env : senv)
  (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= error -> env, h1, h2, r |= okay P Q
 
P: precond
Q: postcond
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: env, h1, h2, r |= error
env, h1, h2, r |= okay P Q

  
P: precond
Q: postcond
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: env, h1, h2, r |= error
exists (h3 : heap) (r1 : result),
  env, h1, h3, r1 |= ens_ \[post_sat Q] /\
  env, h3, h2, r |= req P (ens r. Q r)
 
P: precond
Q: postcond
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: env, h1, h2, r |= error
env, h1, h1, norm vunit |= ens_ \[post_sat Q] /\
env, h1, h2, r |= req P (ens r. Q r)

  (* we need to prove Q, but error is useless for this *)
Abort.
Covariance of ens

(forall v : val, Q1 v ==> Q2 v) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens r. Q1 r) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens r. Q2 r)

  (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
(forall v : val, Q1 v ==> Q2 v) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens r. Q1 r) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens r. Q2 r)

r: result
H: forall v : val, Q1 v ==> Q2 v
H0: env, h1, h2, r |= (ens r. Q1 r)
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens r. Q2 r)

r: result

H3: exists (v : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value),
  r = norm v /\
  Q1 v h3 /\ h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens r. Q2 r)

  Q2 v h3 /\ h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3

forall Q1 Q2 : val -> hprop,
(forall v : val, Q1 v ==> Q2 v) ->
ens r. Q1 r ⊑ ens r. Q2 r

ens r. Q1 r ⊑ ens r. Q2 r

env, h1, h2, r |= (ens r. Q2 r)

H: forall v : val, Q1 v ==> Q2 v
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H0: env, h1, h2, r |= (ens r. Q1 r)
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens r. Q2 r)

  applys* satisfies_ens.
Qed.

h1, h2: heap
r: result

Contravariance of req

  (r : result) (f : flow),
H2 ==> H1 ->

env, h1, h2, r |= req H2 f

  (r : result) (f : flow),
H2 ==> H1 ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req H1 f ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req H2 f

env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
f: flow
H: H2 ==> H1
H0: env, h1, h2, r |= req H1 f
env, h1, h2, r |= req H2 f

env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
f: flow
H: H2 ==> H1
H0: forall hp hr : heap,
H1 hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> env, hr, h2, r |= f
env, h1, h2, r |= req H2 f

  
H1, H2: hprop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
f: flow
H: H2 ==> H1
H0: forall hp hr : heap,
H1 hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> env, hr, h2, r |= f
forall hp hr : heap,
H2 hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> env, hr, h2, r |= f

  
H1, H2: hprop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
f: flow
H: H2 ==> H1
H0: forall hp hr : heap,
H1 hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> env, hr, h2, r |= f
hH1, hr: heap
H3: H2 hH1
h1 = hr \u hH1 ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hH1 -> env, hr, h2, r |= f

  (* hH1 is the heap that satisfies H1 *)
  (* hr is the starting heap of the continuation *)
  
H1, H2: hprop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
f: flow
H: H2 ==> H1
H0: forall hp hr : heap,
H1 hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> env, hr, h2, r |= f
hH1, hr: heap
H3: H1 hH1
h1 = hr \u hH1 ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hH1 -> env, hr, h2, r |= f

  
H1, H2: hprop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
f: flow
H: H2 ==> H1
hH1, hr: heap
H0: h1 = hr \u hH1 ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hH1 -> env, hr, h2, r |= f
H3: H1 hH1
h1 = hr \u hH1 ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hH1 -> env, hr, h2, r |= f

  intuition.
Qed.

disj f1 f2;; f3 ⊑ disj (f1;; f3) (f2;; f3)

disj f1 f2;; f3 ⊑ disj (f1;; f3) (f2;; f3)

  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (disj f1 f2;; f3) ->

r: result

r: result

  env, h1, h3, r1 |= disj f1 f2 /\
  env, h3, h2, r |= f3
env, h1, h2, r |= disj (f1;; f3) (f2;; f3)

H0: env, h1, h3, r1 |= f1
env, h1, ?h3, ?r1 |= f1 /\ env, ?h3, h2, r |= f3
 intuition eauto.

env: senv
h1, h2: heap

r1: result

env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r1: result
H1: env, h3, h2, r |= f3
H0: env, h1, h3, r1 |= f2
env, h1, ?h3, ?r1 |= f2 /\ env, ?h3, h2, r |= f3
 intuition eauto.
Qed.
seq is associative 
forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result)
  (f1 f2 f3 : flow),
env, h1, h2, r |= (f1;; f2;; f3) <->
env, h1, h2, r |= ((f1;; f2);; f3)

forall f1 f2 f3 : flow,
bientails (f1;; f2;; f3) ((f1;; f2);; f3)


forall f1 f2 f3 : flow,
bientails (f1;; f2;; f3) ((f1;; f2);; f3)

  
f1, f2, f3: flow
bientails (f1;; f2;; f3) ((f1;; f2);; f3)

  split; intros; now apply seq_assoc.
Qed.


forall (env : Fmap.fmap var (option ufun))
  (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result) (f : var) (x v : val)
  (f1 : ufun),
Fmap.read env f = Some f1 ->
env, h1, h2, r |= (f$(x, v)) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= f1 x v

  (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result) (f : var) (x v : val)
  (f1 : ufun),
Fmap.read env f = Some f1 ->
env, h1, h2, r |= (f$(x, v)) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= f1 x v

x, v: val

f0: ufun

env, h1, h2, norm v |= f1 x v

H1: forall (env : Fmap.fmap var (option ufun))
  (h1 h2 : heap) (r : val) (fn : var) (f : ufun)
  (x : val),
Fmap.read env fn = Some f ->
env, h1, h2, norm r |= f x r ->
env, h1, h2, norm r |= (fn$(x, r))
env, h1, h2, norm v |= (f$(x, v))

    
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
h1, h2: heap
v, x: val
f1: ufun
f: var
H: Fmap.read env f = Some f1
H0: env, h1, h2, norm v |= f1 x v
H1: forall (env : Fmap.fmap var (option ufun))
  (h1 h2 : heap) (r : val) (fn : var) (f : ufun)
  (x : val),
Fmap.read env fn = Some f ->
env, h1, h2, norm r |= f x r ->
env, h1, h2, norm r |= (fn$(x, r))
H2: forall (f0 : ufun) (x : val),
Fmap.read env f = Some f0 ->
env, h1, h2, norm v |= f0 x v ->
env, h1, h2, norm v |= (f$(x, v))
env, h1, h2, norm v |= (f$(x, v))

    specializes H2 f1 x H. }
Qed.

  (h1 h2 : heap) (v x : val) (f1 : ufun) (f : var)
  (r : result),
Fmap.read env f = Some f1 ->
env, h1, h2, r |= (f$(x, v)) -> r = norm v

norm v = norm v

  reflexivity.
Qed.


forall (A : Type) (f1 : flow) (f2_ctx : A -> flow),
f1;; (∀ a : A, f2_ctx a) ⊑ ∀ a : A, f1;; f2_ctx a

f1;; (∀ a : A, f2_ctx a) ⊑ ∀ a : A, f1;; f2_ctx a

f1;; (∃ a : A, f2_ctx a) ⊑ ∃ a : A, f1;; f2_ctx a

forall (A : Type) (f1 : flow) (f2_ctx : A -> flow)
  (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (f1;; (∃ a : A, f2_ctx a)) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= (∃ a : A, f1;; f2_ctx a)

  
A: Type
f1: flow
f2_ctx: A -> flow
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: env, h1, h2, r |= (f1;; (∃ a : A, f2_ctx a))
env, h1, h2, r |= (∃ a : A, f1;; f2_ctx a)

  
A: Type
f1: flow
f2_ctx: A -> flow
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r1: result
H0: env, h1, h3, r1 |= f1
H1: env, h3, h2, r |= (∃ a : A, f2_ctx a)
env, h1, h2, r |= (∃ a : A, f1;; f2_ctx a)

  
A: Type
f1: flow
f2_ctx: A -> flow
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r1: result
H0: env, h1, h3, r1 |= f1
v: A
H: env, h3, h2, r |= f2_ctx v
env, h1, h2, r |= (∃ a : A, f1;; f2_ctx a)

  
A: Type
f1: flow
f2_ctx: A -> flow
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r1: result
H0: env, h1, h3, r1 |= f1
v: A
H: env, h3, h2, r |= f2_ctx v
exists v : A, env, h1, h2, r |= (f1;; f2_ctx v)
 
A: Type
f1: flow
f2_ctx: A -> flow
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r1: result
H0: env, h1, h3, r1 |= f1
v: A
H: env, h3, h2, r |= f2_ctx v
env, h1, h2, r |= (f1;; f2_ctx v)

  
A: Type
f1: flow
f2_ctx: A -> flow
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r1: result
H0: env, h1, h3, r1 |= f1
v: A
H: env, h3, h2, r |= f2_ctx v
exists (h3 : heap) (r1 : result),
  env, h1, h3, r1 |= f1 /\ env, h3, h2, r |= f2_ctx v
 
A: Type
f1: flow
f2_ctx: A -> flow
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r1: result
H0: env, h1, h3, r1 |= f1
v: A
H: env, h3, h2, r |= f2_ctx v
exists r2 : result,
  env, h1, ?h3, r2 |= f1 /\
  env, ?h3, h2, r |= f2_ctx v
 
A: Type
f1: flow
f2_ctx: A -> flow
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r1: result
H0: env, h1, h3, r1 |= f1
v: A
H: env, h3, h2, r |= f2_ctx v
env, h1, ?h3, ?r1 |= f1 /\ env, ?h3, h2, r |= f2_ctx v

  
A: Type
f1: flow
f2_ctx: A -> flow
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r1: result
H0: env, h1, h3, r1 |= f1
v: A
H: env, h3, h2, r |= f2_ctx v
env, h1, ?h3, ?r1 |= f1
A: Type
f1: flow
f2_ctx: A -> flow
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r1: result
H0: env, h1, h3, r1 |= f1
v: A
H: env, h3, h2, r |= f2_ctx v
env, ?h3, h2, r |= f2_ctx v

  
A: Type
f1: flow
f2_ctx: A -> flow
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r1: result
H0: env, h1, h3, r1 |= f1
v: A
H: env, h3, h2, r |= f2_ctx v
env, h3, h2, r |= f2_ctx v

  exact H.
Qed.


forall H1 H2 : hprop,
ens_ H1;; ens_ H2 ⊑ ens_ H2;; ens_ H1


forall H1 H2 : hprop,
ens_ H1;; ens_ H2 ⊑ ens_ H2;; ens_ H1

  
forall (H1 H2 : hprop) (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; ens_ H2) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H2;; ens_ H1)
 
H1, H2: hprop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; ens_ H2)
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H2;; ens_ H1)

  
H1, H2: hprop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r1: result
H0: env, h1, h3, r1 |= ens_ H1
H3: env, h3, h2, r |= ens_ H2
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H2;; ens_ H1)

  
H1, H2: hprop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r1: result
H3: env, h3, h2, r |= ens_ H2
H0: exists (v : val) (h4 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value),
  r1 = norm v /\
  (\[v = vunit] \* H1) h4 /\
  h3 = h1 \u h4 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h4
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H2;; ens_ H1)
 
H1, H2: hprop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r1: result
H3: env, h3, h2, r |= ens_ H2
v: val
h0: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H: r1 = norm v
H0: (\[v = vunit] \* H1) h0
H4: h3 = h1 \u h0
H6: Fmap.disjoint h1 h0
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H2;; ens_ H1)

  
H1, H2: hprop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r1: result
v: val
h0: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H: r1 = norm v
H0: (\[v = vunit] \* H1) h0
H4: h3 = h1 \u h0
H6: Fmap.disjoint h1 h0
H3: exists (v : val) (h4 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value),
  r = norm v /\
  (\[v = vunit] \* H2) h4 /\
  h2 = h3 \u h4 /\ Fmap.disjoint h3 h4
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H2;; ens_ H1)

h4: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H5: r = norm v0
H3: (\[v0 = vunit] \* H2) h4
H7: h2 = h3 \u h4
H9: Fmap.disjoint h3 h4
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H2;; ens_ H1)

Compaction rule 1 from the paper 
forall f : flow,
bientails (ens_ \[False]) (ens_ \[False];; f)


forall f : flow,
bientails (ens_ \[False]) (ens_ \[False];; f)

  (env : senv),
env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ \[False] <->
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ \[False];; f)

H: False /\ h1 = h2 /\ r = norm vunit
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ \[False];; f)

h3: heap

Qed.

env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ \[True];; f)

Qed.

forall (H : precond) (f1 f2 : flow),
req H f1;; f2 ⊑ req H (f1;; f2)

req H f1;; f2 ⊑ req H (f1;; f2)

  (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (req H f1;; f2) ->

Splitting and combining reqs 
forall (H1 H2 : precond) (f : flow),
req H1 (req H2 f) ⊑ req (H1 \* H2) f


forall (H1 H2 : precond) (f : flow),
req H1 (req H2 f) ⊑ req (H1 \* H2) f

  
forall (H1 H2 : precond) (f : flow) (env : senv)
  (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= req H1 (req H2 f) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req (H1 \* H2) f

  
H1, H2: precond
f: flow
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: env, h1, h2, r |= req H1 (req H2 f)
env, h1, h2, r |= req (H1 \* H2) f

  (* contravariance means we start reasoning from the assumptions in the goal *)
  
H1, H2: precond
f: flow
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: env, h1, h2, r |= req H1 (req H2 f)
forall hp hr : heap,
(H1 \* H2) hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> env, hr, h2, r |= f

  
H1, H2: precond
f: flow
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: env, h1, h2, r |= req H1 (req H2 f)
hb, hr: heap
(H1 \* H2) hb ->
h1 = hr \u hb ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hb -> env, hr, h2, r |= f

f: flow
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: env, h1, h2, r |= req H1 (req H2 f)
hb, hr: heap
H0: (H1 \* H2) hb
H3: h1 = hr \u hb
H4: Fmap.disjoint hr hb
env, hr, h2, r |= f

  
H1, H2: precond
f: flow
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: env, h1, h2, r |= req H1 (req H2 f)
hb, hr, hH1, hH2: heap
H0: H1 hH1
H5: H2 hH2
H6: Fmap.disjoint hH1 hH2
H7: hb = hH1 \u hH2
H3: h1 = hr \u hb
H4: Fmap.disjoint hr hb
env, hr, h2, r |= f


  (* start reasoning forward *)

f: flow
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
hb, hr, hH1, hH2: heap

H1 hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->

H1 hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->

f: flow

H1 hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->

f: flow

H1, H2: precond
f: flow
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
hb, hr, hH1, hH2: heap

req (H1 \* H2) f ⊑ req H1 (req H2 f)

Compaction rule 4 from the paper 
forall (H1 H2 : hprop) (f : flow),
bientails (req (H1 \* H2) f) (req H1 (req H2 f))


forall (H1 H2 : hprop) (f : flow),
bientails (req (H1 \* H2) f) (req H1 (req H2 f))

  
H1, H2: hprop
f: flow
bientails (req (H1 \* H2) f) (req H1 (req H2 f))

  
H1, H2: hprop
f: flow
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env: senv
env, h1, h2, r |= req (H1 \* H2) f ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req H1 (req H2 f)
H1, H2: hprop
f: flow
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env: senv
env, h1, h2, r |= req H1 (req H2 f) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req (H1 \* H2) f

  
H1, H2: hprop
f: flow
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env: senv
env, h1, h2, r |= req (H1 \* H2) f ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req H1 (req H2 f)
 apply norm_req_sep_split.
  
H1, H2: hprop
f: flow
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env: senv
env, h1, h2, r |= req H1 (req H2 f) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req (H1 \* H2) f
 apply norm_req_sep_combine.
Qed.
Splitting and combining ens_s 
forall (H1 H2 : hprop) (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ (H1 \* H2) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; ens_ H2)


forall (H1 H2 : hprop) (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ (H1 \* H2) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; ens_ H2)

  
H1, H2: hprop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ (H1 \* H2)
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; ens_ H2)

  
H1, H2: hprop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: exists (v : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value),
  r = norm v /\
  (\[v = vunit] \* H1 \* H2) h3 /\
  h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; ens_ H2)
 
H1, H2: hprop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H3: r = norm v
H4: (\[v = vunit] \* H1 \* H2) h3
H5: h2 = h1 \u h3
H6: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; ens_ H2)

  
H1, H2: hprop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H3: r = norm v
H4: v = vunit /\ (H1 \* H2) h3
H5: h2 = h1 \u h3
H6: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; ens_ H2)
 
H1, H2: hprop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H3: r = norm v
H4: v = vunit
H7: (H1 \* H2) h3
H5: h2 = h1 \u h3
H6: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; ens_ H2)

  (* h3 is the heap that H1 and H2 together add *)
  (* find the intermediate heap *)
  
H1, H2: hprop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H3: r = norm v
H4: v = vunit
H7: exists h1 h2 : heap,
  H1 h1 /\
  H2 h2 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h2 /\ h3 = h1 \u h2
H5: h2 = h1 \u h3
H6: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; ens_ H2)

env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H3: r = norm v
H4: v = vunit
h0, h4: heap
H8: H1 h0
H9: H2 h4
H10: Fmap.disjoint h0 h4
H11: h3 = h0 \u h4
H5: h2 = h1 \u h3
H6: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; ens_ H2)

  (* H1 h0, H2 h4 *)

env: senv

H4: v = vunit

H9: H2 h4

H11: h3 = h0 \u h4
H5: h2 = h1 \u h3

exists (h3 : heap) (r1 : result),
  env, h1, h3, r1 |= ens_ H1 /\
  env, h3, h2, r |= ens_ H2

  
H1, H2: hprop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value

H4: v = vunit

  env, h1, h1 \u h0, r1 |= ens_ H1 /\

env, h1 \u h0, h2, r |= ens_ H2

env: senv

env: senv
h1, h2: heap

h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value

h0, h4: heap

H1, H2: hprop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H3: r = norm v
H4: v = vunit
h0, h4: heap
H8: H1 h0
H9: H2 h4
H10: Fmap.disjoint h0 h4
H11: h3 = h0 \u h4
H5: h2 = h1 \u h3

H1, H2: hprop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H3: r = norm v
H4: v = vunit
h0, h4: heap
H8: H1 h0
H9: H2 h4
H10: Fmap.disjoint h0 h4
H11: h3 = h0 \u h4
H5: h2 = h1 \u h3
H6: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
exists (v : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value),
  norm vunit = norm v /\
  (\[v = vunit] \* H1) h3 /\
  h1 \u h0 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
 
H1, H2: hprop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H3: r = norm v
H4: v = vunit
h0, h4: heap
H8: H1 h0
H9: H2 h4
H10: Fmap.disjoint h0 h4
H11: h3 = h0 \u h4
H5: h2 = h1 \u h3
H6: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
exists h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value,
  norm vunit = norm vunit /\
  (\[vunit = vunit] \* H1) h3 /\
  h1 \u h0 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
 
H1, H2: hprop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H3: r = norm v
H4: v = vunit
h0, h4: heap
H8: H1 h0
H9: H2 h4
H10: Fmap.disjoint h0 h4
H11: h3 = h0 \u h4
H5: h2 = h1 \u h3
H6: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
norm vunit = norm vunit /\
(\[vunit = vunit] \* H1) h0 /\
h1 \u h0 = h1 \u h0 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h0

env: senv

H5: h2 = h1 \u h3
H6: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
(\[vunit = vunit] \* H1) h0

H11: h3 = h0 \u h4
H5: h2 = h1 \u h3
H6: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
vunit = vunit /\ H1 h0
 intuition.

forall (H1 H2 : hprop) (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; ens_ H2) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ (H1 \* H2)

env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; ens_ H2) ->

  env, h3, h2, r |= ens_ H2

forall (H1 H2 : hprop) (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; ens_ H2) <->
env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ (H1 \* H2)


forall (H1 H2 : hprop) (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; ens_ H2) <->
env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ (H1 \* H2)

  
H1, H2: hprop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; ens_ H2) <->
env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ (H1 \* H2)
 
H1, H2: hprop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; ens_ H2) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ (H1 \* H2)
H1, H2: hprop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ (H1 \* H2) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; ens_ H2)

  
H1, H2: hprop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; ens_ H2) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ (H1 \* H2)
 apply satisfies_ens_ens_void_combine.
  
H1, H2: hprop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ (H1 \* H2) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; ens_ H2)
 apply satisfies_ens_ens_void_split.
Qed.


forall H1 H2 : hprop,
ens_ (H1 \* H2) ⊑ ens_ H1;; ens_ H2


forall H1 H2 : hprop,
ens_ (H1 \* H2) ⊑ ens_ H1;; ens_ H2

  
forall (H1 H2 : hprop) (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ (H1 \* H2) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; ens_ H2)
 apply satisfies_ens_ens_void_split.
Qed.


forall H1 H2 : hprop,
ens_ H1;; ens_ H2 ⊑ ens_ (H1 \* H2)


forall H1 H2 : hprop,
ens_ H1;; ens_ H2 ⊑ ens_ (H1 \* H2)

  unfold entails; apply satisfies_ens_ens_void_combine.
Qed.


forall H1 H2 : hprop,
bientails (ens_ (H1 \* H2)) (ens_ H1;; ens_ H2)

bientails (ens_ (H1 \* H2)) (ens_ H1;; ens_ H2)

h1, h2: heap
r: result
env: senv
env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ (H1 \* H2) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; ens_ H2)

h1, h2: heap
r: result
env: senv
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; ens_ H2) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ (H1 \* H2)

r: result
env: senv
env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ (H1 \* H2) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; ens_ H2)
 apply norm_ens_ens_void_split.
  
H1, H2: hprop
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env: senv
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; ens_ H2) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= ens_ (H1 \* H2)
 apply norm_ens_ens_void_combine.
Qed.
Compaction rule 5 from the paper 
forall (H : hprop) (Q : postcond),
bientails (ens_ H;; (ens r. Q r)) (ens x. Q x \* H)


forall (H : hprop) (Q : postcond),
bientails (ens_ H;; (ens r. Q r)) (ens x. Q x \* H)

  
forall (H : hprop) (Q : postcond),
bientails (ens_ H;; (ens r. Q r)) (ens x. Q x \* H)

  
H: hprop
Q: postcond
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env: senv
H0: env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H;; (ens r. Q r))
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens x. Q x \* H)
H: hprop
Q: postcond
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env: senv
H0: env, h1, h2, r |= (ens x. Q x \* H)
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H;; (ens r. Q r))

  
H: hprop
Q: postcond
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env: senv
H0: env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H;; (ens r. Q r))
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens x. Q x \* H)
 
H: hprop
Q: postcond
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env: senv
H0: exists (h3 : heap) (r1 : result),
  env, h1, h3, r1 |= ens_ H /\
  env, h3, h2, r |= (ens r. Q r)
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens x. Q x \* H)
 
H: hprop
Q: postcond
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env: senv
h3: heap
r1: result
H1: env, h1, h3, r1 |= ens_ H
H2: env, h3, h2, r |= (ens r. Q r)
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens x. Q x \* H)

    
H: hprop
Q: postcond
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env: senv
h3: heap
r1: result
H2: env, h3, h2, r |= (ens r. Q r)
H1: exists (v : val) (h4 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value),
  r1 = norm v /\
  (\[v = vunit] \* H) h4 /\
  h3 = h1 \u h4 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h4
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens x. Q x \* H)
 
H: hprop
Q: postcond
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env: senv
h3: heap
r1: result
H2: env, h3, h2, r |= (ens r. Q r)
v: val
h0: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H0: r1 = norm v
H1: (\[v = vunit] \* H) h0
H3: h3 = h1 \u h0
H5: Fmap.disjoint h1 h0
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens x. Q x \* H)

    
H: hprop
Q: postcond
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env: senv
h3: heap
r1: result
v: val
h0: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H0: r1 = norm v
H1: (\[v = vunit] \* H) h0
H3: h3 = h1 \u h0
H5: Fmap.disjoint h1 h0
H2: exists (v : val) (h4 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value),
  r = norm v /\
  Q v h4 /\ h2 = h3 \u h4 /\ Fmap.disjoint h3 h4
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens x. Q x \* H)

Q: postcond

H2: Q v0 h4
H6: h2 = h3 \u h4
H8: Fmap.disjoint h3 h4
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens x. Q x \* H)

H: hprop
Q: postcond
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env: senv
H0: env, h1, h2, r |= (ens x. Q x \* H)
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H;; (ens r. Q r))

Q: postcond
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env: senv
H0: env, h1, h2, r |= (ens x. Q x \* H)
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H;; (ens r. Q r))
 
H: hprop
Q: postcond
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env: senv
H0: exists (v : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value),
  r = norm v /\
  (Q v \* H) h3 /\
  h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H;; (ens r. Q r))

Q: postcond
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env: senv
v: val

H2: h2 = h1 \u h3
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H;; (ens r. Q r))

    
H: hprop
Q: postcond
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env: senv
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H1: r = norm v
H0: exists h1 h2 : heap,
  Q v h1 /\
  H h2 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h2 /\ h3 = h1 \u h2
H2: h2 = h1 \u h3
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H;; (ens r. Q r))

Q: postcond
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env: senv
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H1: r = norm v
h0, h4: heap
H3: Q v h0
H0: H h4
H5: Fmap.disjoint h0 h4
H7: h3 = h0 \u h4
H2: h2 = h1 \u h3
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H;; (ens r. Q r))

Q: postcond
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env: senv
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value

H3: Q v h0
H0: H h4
H5: Fmap.disjoint h0 h4
H7: h3 = h0 \u h4
H2: h2 = h1 \u h3
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
exists (h3 : heap) (r1 : result),
  env, h1, h3, r1 |= ens_ H /\
  env, h3, h2, r |= (ens r. Q r)

Q: postcond
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env: senv

h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value

H: hprop
Q: postcond
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env: senv
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H1: r = norm v
h0, h4: heap
H3: Q v h0
H0: H h4
H5: Fmap.disjoint h0 h4
H7: h3 = h0 \u h4
H2: h2 = h1 \u h3
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
exists (v : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value),
  norm vunit = norm v /\
  (\[v = vunit] \* H) h3 /\
  h1 \u h4 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3

env: senv

H7: h3 = h0 \u h4

H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
exists h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value,
  norm vunit = norm vunit /\
  (\[vunit = vunit] \* H) h3 /\
  h1 \u h4 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3

H: hprop
Q: postcond
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env: senv
v: val

H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
exists h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value,
  r = norm v /\
  Q v h3 /\
  h2 = (h1 \u h4) \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint (h1 \u h4) h3

      
H: hprop
Q: postcond
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env: senv
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H1: r = norm v
h0, h4: heap
H3: Q v h0
H0: H h4
H5: Fmap.disjoint h0 h4
H7: h3 = h0 \u h4
H2: h2 = h1 \u h3
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
r = norm v /\
Q v h0 /\
h2 = (h1 \u h4) \u h0 /\ Fmap.disjoint (h1 \u h4) h0

      
H: hprop
Q: postcond
h1, h2: heap
r: result
env: senv
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H1: r = norm v
h0, h4: heap
H3: Q v h0
H0: H h4
H5: Fmap.disjoint h0 h4
H7: h3 = h0 \u h4
H2: h2 = h1 \u h3
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
h2 = (h1 \u h4) \u h0

      fmap_eq. } }
Qed.
Splitting and combining ens with results is more complex, and there does not seem to be a single equivalence. 
forall (Q1 Q2 : postcond) (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= ((ens r. Q1 r);; (ens r. Q2 r)) ->
env, h1, h2, r
|= (ens r0. \exists r1 : val, Q1 r1 \* Q2 r0)

  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= ((ens r. Q1 r);; (ens r. Q2 r)) ->
env, h1, h2, r
|= (ens r0. \exists r1 : val, Q1 r1 \* Q2 r0)

env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: env, h1, h2, r |= ((ens r. Q1 r);; (ens r. Q2 r))
env, h1, h2, r
|= (ens r0. \exists r1 : val, Q1 r1 \* Q2 r0)

h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r1: result
H1: env, h1, h3, r1 |= (ens r. Q1 r)
H2: env, h3, h2, r |= (ens r. Q2 r)
env, h1, h2, r
|= (ens r0. \exists r1 : val, Q1 r1 \* Q2 r0)

env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r1: result
H1: env, h1, h3, r1 |= (ens r. Q1 r)
H2: env, h3, h2, r |= (ens r. Q2 r)
exists (v : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value),
  r = norm v /\
  (\exists r1 : val, Q1 r1 \* Q2 v) h3 /\
  h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3

env: senv

v: val
h3: heap
r1: result

exists (v0 : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value),
  norm v = norm v0 /\
  (\exists r1 : val, Q1 r1 \* Q2 v0) h3 /\
  h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3

forall Q1 Q2 : postcond,
(ens r. Q1 r);; (ens r. Q2 r)
⊑ ens r. \exists r1 : val, Q1 r1 \* Q2 r


forall Q1 Q2 : postcond,
(ens r. Q1 r);; (ens r. Q2 r)
⊑ ens r. \exists r1 : val, Q1 r1 \* Q2 r

  
forall (Q1 Q2 : postcond) (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= ((ens r. Q1 r);; (ens r. Q2 r)) ->
env, h1, h2, r
|= (ens r0. \exists r1 : val, Q1 r1 \* Q2 r0)

  apply satisfies_ens_sep_combine.
Qed.


forall (H : hprop) (Q : val -> hprop) (env : senv)
  (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens x. Q x \* H) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= ((ens _. H);; (ens r. Q r))


forall (H : hprop) (Q : val -> hprop) (env : senv)
  (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens x. Q x \* H) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= ((ens _. H);; (ens r. Q r))

  
H: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H0: env, h1, h2, r |= (ens x. Q x \* H)
env, h1, h2, r |= ((ens _. H);; (ens r. Q r))

  
H: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H0: exists (v : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value),
  r = norm v /\
  (Q v \* H) h3 /\
  h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
env, h1, h2, r |= ((ens _. H);; (ens r. Q r))

  
H: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H1: r = norm v
H2: (Q v \* H) h3
H3: h2 = h1 \u h3
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
env, h1, h2, r |= ((ens _. H);; (ens r. Q r))

  (* h3 is the part satisfying both *)
  
H: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H1: r = norm v
H2: exists h1 h2 : heap,
  Q v h1 /\
  H h2 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h2 /\ h3 = h1 \u h2
H3: h2 = h1 \u h3
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
env, h1, h2, r |= ((ens _. H);; (ens r. Q r))

Q: val -> hprop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H1: r = norm v
h0, h4: heap
H0: Q v h0
H2: H h4
H5: Fmap.disjoint h0 h4
H6: h3 = h0 \u h4
H3: h2 = h1 \u h3
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
env, h1, h2, r |= ((ens _. H);; (ens r. Q r))

  (* h0 is the part satisfying Q, h4 H *)

Q: val -> hprop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H1: r = norm v
h0, h4: heap
H0: Q v h0
H2: H h4
H5: Fmap.disjoint h0 h4
H6: h3 = h0 \u h4
H3: h2 = h1 \u h3
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
exists (h3 : heap) (r1 : result),
  env, h1, h3, r1 |= (ens _. H) /\
  env, h3, h2, r |= (ens r. Q r)

H3: h2 = h1 \u h3
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
env, h1 \u h4, h2, r |= (ens r. Q r)

  
H: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H1: r = norm v
h0, h4: heap
H0: Q v h0
H2: H h4
H5: Fmap.disjoint h0 h4
H6: h3 = h0 \u h4
H3: h2 = h1 \u h3
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
env, h1 \u h4, h2, r |= (ens r. Q r)


  
H: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H1: r = norm v
h0, h4: heap
H0: Q v h0
H2: H h4
H5: Fmap.disjoint h0 h4
H6: h3 = h0 \u h4
H3: h2 = h1 \u h3
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
exists (v : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value),
  r = norm v /\
  Q v h3 /\
  h2 = (h1 \u h4) \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint (h1 \u h4) h3

  
H: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H1: r = norm v
h0, h4: heap
H0: Q v h0
H2: H h4
H5: Fmap.disjoint h0 h4
H6: h3 = h0 \u h4
H3: h2 = h1 \u h3
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
exists h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value,
  r = norm v /\
  Q v h3 /\
  h2 = (h1 \u h4) \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint (h1 \u h4) h3

Q: val -> hprop

h0, h4: heap
H0: Q v h0
H2: H h4

H3: h2 = h1 \u h3

r = norm v /\
Q v h0 /\
h2 = (h1 \u h4) \u h0 /\ Fmap.disjoint (h1 \u h4) h0

  
H: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: val
h3: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H1: r = norm v
h0, h4: heap
H0: Q v h0
H2: H h4
H5: Fmap.disjoint h0 h4
H6: h3 = h0 \u h4
H3: h2 = h1 \u h3
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
h2 = (h1 \u h4) \u h0

  
H: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
env: senv
h1: heap
v: val
h0, h4: heap
H0: Q v h0
H2: H h4
H5: Fmap.disjoint h0 h4
H4: Fmap.disjoint h1 (h0 \u h4)
h1 \u h0 \u h4 = (h1 \u h4) \u h0

  fmap_eq.
Qed.


forall (H : hprop) (Q : val -> hprop),
ens x. Q x \* H ⊑ (ens _. H);; (ens r. Q r)


forall (H : hprop) (Q : val -> hprop),
ens x. Q x \* H ⊑ (ens _. H);; (ens r. Q r)

  
forall (H : hprop) (Q : val -> hprop) (env : senv)
  (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens x. Q x \* H) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= ((ens _. H);; (ens r. Q r))

  apply satisfies_ens_sep_split.
Qed.

  env, h1, h3, r1 |= f v /\ env, h3, h2, r |= f1

Qed.

forall (H1 H2 : hprop) (f1 f2 : flow),

H1 ==> H2 -> f1 ⊑ f2 -> ens_ H1;; f1 ⊑ ens_ H2;; f2

env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; f1) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H2;; f2)

Rule EntReq from the paper 
forall (H1 H2 : hprop) (f1 f2 : flow),
H2 ==> H1 -> f1 ⊑ f2 -> req H1 f1 ⊑ req H2 f2


forall (H1 H2 : hprop) (f1 f2 : flow),
H2 ==> H1 -> f1 ⊑ f2 -> req H1 f1 ⊑ req H2 f2

  
forall (H1 H2 : hprop) (f1 f2 : flow),
H2 ==> H1 ->
(forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= f1 -> env, h1, h2, r |= f2) ->
forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= req H1 f1 ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req H2 f2

  
H1, H2: hprop
f1, f2: flow
H: H2 ==> H1
H0: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= f1 -> env, h1, h2, r |= f2
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H3: env, h1, h2, r |= req H1 f1
env, h1, h2, r |= req H2 f2

  
H1, H2: hprop
f1, f2: flow
H: H2 ==> H1
H0: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= f1 -> env, h1, h2, r |= f2
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H3: env, h1, h2, r |= req H1 f1
forall hp hr : heap,
H2 hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> env, hr, h2, r |= f2
 
H1, H2: hprop
f1, f2: flow
H: H2 ==> H1
H0: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= f1 -> env, h1, h2, r |= f2
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H3: env, h1, h2, r |= req H1 f1
hH2, h3: heap
H2 hH2 ->
h1 = h3 \u hH2 ->
Fmap.disjoint h3 hH2 -> env, h3, h2, r |= f2
 
H1, H2: hprop
f1, f2: flow
H: H2 ==> H1
H0: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= f1 -> env, h1, h2, r |= f2
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H3: env, h1, h2, r |= req H1 f1
hH2, h3: heap
H4: H2 hH2
H5: h1 = h3 \u hH2
H6: Fmap.disjoint h3 hH2
env, h3, h2, r |= f2

  
H1, H2: hprop
f1, f2: flow
H: H2 ==> H1
H0: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= f1 -> env, h1, h2, r |= f2
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
hH2, h3: heap
H4: H2 hH2
H5: h1 = h3 \u hH2
H6: Fmap.disjoint h3 hH2
H3: forall hp hr : heap,
H1 hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> env, hr, h2, r |= f1
env, h3, h2, r |= f2
 specializes H3 hH2 h3.
Qed.
Rule DisjLeft from the paper 
forall f1 f2 f3 : flow,
f1 ⊑ f3 -> f2 ⊑ f3 -> disj f1 f2 ⊑ f3


forall f1 f2 f3 : flow,
f1 ⊑ f3 -> f2 ⊑ f3 -> disj f1 f2 ⊑ f3

  
forall f1 f2 f3 : flow,
(forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= f1 -> env, h1, h2, r |= f3) ->
(forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= f2 -> env, h1, h2, r |= f3) ->
forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= disj f1 f2 -> env, h1, h2, r |= f3

  
f1, f2, f3: flow
H: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= f1 -> env, h1, h2, r |= f3
H0: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= f2 -> env, h1, h2, r |= f3
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H1: env, h1, h2, r |= disj f1 f2
env, h1, h2, r |= f3

  inverts H1 as H1; auto.
Qed.
Half of DisjRight from the paper 
forall f1 f2 f3 : flow, f3 ⊑ f1 -> f3 ⊑ disj f1 f2


forall f1 f2 f3 : flow, f3 ⊑ f1 -> f3 ⊑ disj f1 f2

  
forall f1 f2 f3 : flow,
(forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= f3 -> env, h1, h2, r |= f1) ->
forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= f3 -> env, h1, h2, r |= disj f1 f2

  
f1, f2, f3: flow
H: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= f3 -> env, h1, h2, r |= f1
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H0: env, h1, h2, r |= f3
env, h1, h2, r |= disj f1 f2

  
f1, f2, f3: flow
H: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= f3 -> env, h1, h2, r |= f1
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H0: env, h1, h2, r |= f3
env, h1, h2, r |= f1

  auto.
Qed.
The other half of DisjRight from the paper 
forall f1 f2 f3 : flow, f3 ⊑ f2 -> f3 ⊑ disj f1 f2


forall f1 f2 f3 : flow, f3 ⊑ f2 -> f3 ⊑ disj f1 f2

  
forall f1 f2 f3 : flow,
(forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= f3 -> env, h1, h2, r |= f2) ->
forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= f3 -> env, h1, h2, r |= disj f1 f2

  
f1, f2, f3: flow
H: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= f3 -> env, h1, h2, r |= f2
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H0: env, h1, h2, r |= f3
env, h1, h2, r |= disj f1 f2

  
f1, f2, f3: flow
H: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= f3 -> env, h1, h2, r |= f2
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H0: env, h1, h2, r |= f3
env, h1, h2, r |= f2

  auto.
Qed.
EntFunc 
forall (f : var) (x r : val), f$(x, r) ⊑ f$(x, r)


forall (f : var) (x r : val), f$(x, r) ⊑ f$(x, r)

  
f: var
x, r: val
f$(x, r) ⊑ f$(x, r)

  apply entails_refl.
Qed.

Biabduction

Simplified definition following Compositional Shape Analysis by means of Bi-Abduction (Fig 1). 
Inductive biab : hprop -> hprop -> hprop -> hprop -> Prop :=

  | b_base_empty : forall Hf,
    biab \[] Hf \[] Hf

  | b_pts_match : forall a b H1 H2 Ha Hf x,
    biab Ha H1 H2 Hf ->
    biab (\[a=b] \* Ha) (x~~>a \* H1) (x~~>b \* H2) Hf

  | b_any_match : forall H H1 H2 Ha Hf,
    biab Ha H1 H2 Hf ->
    biab Ha (H \* H1) (H \* H2) Hf

  | b_pts_diff : forall a b H1 H2 Ha Hf x y,
    (* x <> y -> *)
    biab Ha H1 H2 Hf ->
    biab (y~~>b \* Ha) (x~~>a \* H1) (y~~>b \* H2) (x~~>a \* Hf).


forall (x : loc) (a b : Val.value),
biab \[a = b] (x ~~> a) (x ~~> b) \[]


forall (x : loc) (a b : Val.value),
biab \[a = b] (x ~~> a) (x ~~> b) \[]

  
x: loc
a, b: Val.value
biab \[a = b] (x ~~> a) (x ~~> b) \[]

  
x: loc
a, b: Val.value
biab \[a = b] (x ~~> a \* \[]) (x ~~> b) \[]

  
x: loc
a, b: Val.value
biab \[a = b] (x ~~> a \* \[]) (x ~~> b \* \[]) \[]

  
x: loc
a, b: Val.value
\[a = b] = \[a = b] \* ?Ha
x: loc
a, b: Val.value
biab ?Ha \[] \[] \[]

  
x: loc
a, b: Val.value
\[a = b] = \[a = b] \* \[]
x: loc
a, b: Val.value
biab \[] \[] \[] \[]

  
x: loc
a, b: Val.value
a = b -> a = b
x: loc
a, b: Val.value
a = b -> a = b
x: loc
a, b: Val.value
biab \[] \[] \[] \[]

  
x: loc
a, b: Val.value
a = b -> a = b
x: loc
a, b: Val.value
biab \[] \[] \[] \[]

  
x: loc
a, b: Val.value
biab \[] \[] \[] \[]

  apply b_base_empty.
Qed.


forall (x y : loc) (a b : Val.value),
biab (y ~~> b) (x ~~> a) (y ~~> b) (x ~~> a)


forall (x y : loc) (a b : Val.value),
biab (y ~~> b) (x ~~> a) (y ~~> b) (x ~~> a)

  
x, y: loc
a, b: Val.value
biab (y ~~> b) (x ~~> a) (y ~~> b) (x ~~> a)

  (x ~~> a \* \[])

a, b: Val.value
biab (y ~~> b \* \[]) (x ~~> a \* \[])
  (y ~~> b \* \[]) (x ~~> a \* \[])

  
x, y: loc
a, b: Val.value
biab \[] \[] \[] \[]

  apply b_base_empty.
Qed.

forall (H : hprop) (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result) (H1 H2 : hprop) (f : flow),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ (H \* H1);; req (H \* H2) f) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f)


forall (H : hprop) (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result) (H1 H2 : hprop) (f : flow),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ (H \* H1);; req (H \* H2) f) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f)

  
H: hprop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H1, H2: hprop
f: flow
H0: env, h1, h2, r
|= (ens_ (H \* H1);; req (H \* H2) f)
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f)

env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H1, H2: hprop
f: flow
H0: exists (h3 : heap) (r1 : result),
  env, h1, h3, r1 |= ens_ (H \* H1) /\
  env, h3, h2, r |= req (H \* H2) f
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f)
 
H: hprop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H1, H2: hprop
f: flow
h3: heap
r1: result
H3: env, h1, h3, r1 |= ens_ (H \* H1)
H4: env, h3, h2, r |= req (H \* H2) f
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f)

  (* ens adds a location to the heap *)
  
H: hprop
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H1, H2: hprop
f: flow
h3: heap
r1: result
H4: env, h3, h2, r |= req (H \* H2) f
H3: exists (v : val) (h4 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value),
  r1 = norm v /\
  (\[v = vunit] \* H \* H1) h4 /\
  h3 = h1 \u h4 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h4
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f)

  (* use that to figure out what is in h3 *)

H0: r1 = norm v

H5: h3 = h1 \u h0
H7: Fmap.disjoint h1 h0
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f)

env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f)

h1 \u x1 \u x2 = hr \u hp ->

H11: H1 x2
H12: Fmap.disjoint x1 x2
H8: Fmap.disjoint Fmap.empty (x1 \u x2)
H7: Fmap.disjoint h1 (x1 \u x2)
H4: env, h1 \u x2, h2, r |= req H2 f
vunit = vunit /\ H1 x2
 intuition.

Biabduction for a single location. 
forall (x : loc) (a : Val.value) (env : senv)
  (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result) (H1 H2 : hprop)
  (f : flow),
env, h1, h2, r
|= (ens_ (x ~~> a \* H1);; req (x ~~> a \* H2) f) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f)

We can remove a framing heap hf from both sides of a satisfies if it is disjoint from the part of the heap satisfying ens_ H. 
forall (env : senv)
  (h1 h hf : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value) (r : result)
  (H : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value -> Prop),
H h ->
Fmap.disjoint h (hf \u h1) ->
env, hf \u h1, hf \u h1 \u h, r |= ens_ H ->
env, h1, h1 \u h, r |= ens_ H

H h ->
Fmap.disjoint h (hf \u h1) ->
env, hf \u h1, hf \u h1 \u h, r |= ens_ H ->
env, h1, h1 \u h, r |= ens_ H

h1, h, hf: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value

H0: H h

H1: exists (v : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value),
  r = norm v /\
  (\[v = vunit] \* H) h3 /\
  hf \u h1 \u h = (hf \u h1) \u h3 /\
  Fmap.disjoint (hf \u h1) h3
env, h1, h1 \u h, r |= ens_ H

The Float Pre rule (compaction 6) from the paper. 
forall (H1 H2 Ha Hf : hprop) (f : flow),
biab Ha H1 H2 Hf ->
ens_ H1;; req H2 f ⊑ req Ha (ens_ Hf;; f)


forall (H1 H2 Ha Hf : hprop) (f : flow),
biab Ha H1 H2 Hf ->
ens_ H1;; req H2 f ⊑ req Ha (ens_ Hf;; f)

biab Ha H1 H2 Hf ->

env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req Ha (ens_ Hf;; f)

env, h1, h2, r |= req Ha (ens_ Hf;; f)

|= (ens_ (x ~~> a \* H1);; req (x ~~> b \* H2) f) ->

f: flow
a, b: Val.value
H1, H2, Ha, Hf: hprop
x, y: loc
Hbi: biab Ha H1 H2 Hf
IHHbi: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req Ha (ens_ Hf;; f)
forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r
|= (ens_ (x ~~> a \* H1);; req (y ~~> b \* H2) f) ->
env, h1, h2, r
|= req (y ~~> b \* Ha) (ens_ (x ~~> a \* Hf);; f)


  
f: flow
a, b: Val.value
H1, H2, Ha, Hf: hprop
x: loc
Hbi: biab Ha H1 H2 Hf
IHHbi: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req Ha (ens_ Hf;; f)
forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r
|= (ens_ (x ~~> a \* H1);; req (x ~~> b \* H2) f) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req (\[a = b] \* Ha) (ens_ Hf;; f)

H1, H2, Ha, Hf: hprop
x: loc
Hbi: biab Ha H1 H2 Hf
IHHbi: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req Ha (ens_ Hf;; f)
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: env, h1, h2, r
|= (ens_ (x ~~> a \* H1);; req (x ~~> b \* H2) f)
env, h1, h2, r |= req (\[a = b] \* Ha) (ens_ Hf;; f)


    (* use the req *)
    
f: flow

H1, H2, Ha, Hf: hprop
x: loc

IHHbi: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req Ha (ens_ Hf;; f)
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: env, h1, h2, r
|= (ens_ (x ~~> a \* H1);; req (x ~~> b \* H2) f)
env, h1, h2, r |= req \[a = b] (req Ha (ens_ Hf;; f))

    
f: flow
a, b: Val.value
H1, H2, Ha, Hf: hprop
x: loc
Hbi: biab Ha H1 H2 Hf
IHHbi: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req Ha (ens_ Hf;; f)
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: env, h1, h2, r
|= (ens_ (x ~~> a \* H1);; req (x ~~> b \* H2) f)
forall hp hr : heap,
\[a = b] hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp ->
env, hr, h2, r |= req Ha (ens_ Hf;; f)

x: loc

  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f) ->

env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: env, h1, h2, r
|= (ens_ (x ~~> a \* H1);; req (x ~~> b \* H2) f)
hp, hr: heap
H0: \[a = b] hp
H3: h1 = hr \u hp
H4: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
env, hr, h2, r |= req Ha (ens_ Hf;; f)

r: result
H: env, h1, h2, r
|= (ens_ (x ~~> a \* H1);; req (x ~~> b \* H2) f)
hp, hr: heap
H0: a = b
H5: hp = Fmap.empty

    apply (biab_single H). 
f: flow
H, H1, H2, Ha, Hf: hprop
Hbi: biab Ha H1 H2 Hf
IHHbi: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req Ha (ens_ Hf;; f)
forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ (H \* H1);; req (H \* H2) f) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req Ha (ens_ Hf;; f)

x, y: loc

IHHbi: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req Ha (ens_ Hf;; f)
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H3: env, h1, h2, r
|= (ens_ (x ~~> a \* H1);; req (y ~~> b \* H2) f)
env, h1, h2, r
|= req (y ~~> b \* Ha) (ens_ (x ~~> a \* Hf);; f)

    (* the idea of this proof is to demonstrate that we can commute adding x~~>a and removing y~~>b by showing that we can start from a heap without x~~>a (using the lemma ens_reduce_frame), perform the operations, and arrive at the same result. reasoning semantically is quite nasty. maybe we can come up with a way to push y~~>b past H0? *)

    (* h4 -(+h7)-> h3 -(-hyb)-> h5+hxa+h7 -> h2
                  ||
                  h4+h7
                = (h5+hyb+hxa)+h7 *)

    (* extract x~~>a *)
    
f: flow
a, b: Val.value
H1, H2, Ha, Hf: hprop
x, y: loc
Hbi: biab Ha H1 H2 Hf
IHHbi: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req Ha (ens_ Hf;; f)
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H3: exists (h3 : heap) (r1 : result),
  env, h1, h3, r1 |= ens_ (x ~~> a \* H1) /\
  env, h3, h2, r |= req (y ~~> b \* H2) f
env, h1, h2, r
|= req (y ~~> b \* Ha) (ens_ (x ~~> a \* Hf);; f)
 
f: flow
a, b: Val.value
H1, H2, Ha, Hf: hprop
x, y: loc
Hbi: biab Ha H1 H2 Hf
IHHbi: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req Ha (ens_ Hf;; f)
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r0: result
H3: env, h1, h3, r0 |= ens_ (x ~~> a \* H1)
H4: env, h3, h2, r |= req (y ~~> b \* H2) f
env, h1, h2, r
|= req (y ~~> b \* Ha) (ens_ (x ~~> a \* Hf);; f)

    
f: flow
a, b: Val.value
H1, H2, Ha, Hf: hprop
x, y: loc

IHHbi: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req Ha (ens_ Hf;; f)
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r0: result
H3: env, h1, h3, r0 |= (ens_ (x ~~> a);; ens_ H1)
H4: env, h3, h2, r |= req (y ~~> b \* H2) f
env, h1, h2, r
|= req (y ~~> b \* Ha) (ens_ (x ~~> a \* Hf);; f)

    
f: flow
a, b: Val.value
H1, H2, Ha, Hf: hprop
x, y: loc
Hbi: biab Ha H1 H2 Hf
IHHbi: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req Ha (ens_ Hf;; f)
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r0: result
H4: env, h3, h2, r |= req (y ~~> b \* H2) f
H3: exists (h4 : heap) (r1 : result),
  env, h1, h4, r1 |= ens_ (x ~~> a) /\
  env, h4, h3, r0 |= ens_ H1
env, h1, h2, r
|= req (y ~~> b \* Ha) (ens_ (x ~~> a \* Hf);; f)

H1, H2, Ha, Hf: hprop
x, y: loc

IHHbi: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req Ha (ens_ Hf;; f)
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r0: result
H4: env, h3, h2, r |= req (y ~~> b \* H2) f
h4: heap
r1: result
H3: env, h1, h4, r1 |= ens_ (x ~~> a)
H5: env, h4, h3, r0 |= ens_ H1
env, h1, h2, r
|= req (y ~~> b \* Ha) (ens_ (x ~~> a \* Hf);; f)

    
f: flow
a, b: Val.value
H1, H2, Ha, Hf: hprop
x, y: loc
Hbi: biab Ha H1 H2 Hf
IHHbi: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req Ha (ens_ Hf;; f)
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r0: result
H4: env, h3, h2, r |= req (y ~~> b \* H2) f
h4: heap
r1: result
H5: env, h4, h3, r0 |= ens_ H1
H3: exists (v : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value),
  r1 = norm v /\
  (\[v = vunit] \* x ~~> a) h3 /\
  h4 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
env, h1, h2, r
|= req (y ~~> b \* Ha) (ens_ (x ~~> a \* Hf);; f)
 
f: flow
a, b: Val.value
H1, H2, Ha, Hf: hprop
x, y: loc

  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req Ha (ens_ Hf;; f)
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r0: result
H4: env, h3, h2, r |= req (y ~~> b \* H2) f
h4: heap
r1: result
H5: env, h4, h3, r0 |= ens_ H1
v0: val
hxa: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H: r1 = norm v0
H6: (\[v0 = vunit] \* x ~~> a) hxa
H0: h4 = h1 \u hxa
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 hxa
env, h1, h2, r
|= req (y ~~> b \* Ha) (ens_ (x ~~> a \* Hf);; f)

H4: env, h3, h2, r |= req (y ~~> b \* H2) f
h4: heap
r1: result
H5: env, h4, h3, r0 |= ens_ H1
v0: val
hxa: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H: r1 = norm v0
H7: v0 = vunit
H8: (x ~~> a) hxa
H0: h4 = h1 \u hxa
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 hxa
hyb, h5: heap
H6: (y ~~> b) hyb
H9: h1 = h5 \u hyb
H10: Fmap.disjoint h5 hyb
hHa, h6: heap
Ha hHa ->
h5 = h6 \u hHa ->
Fmap.disjoint h6 hHa ->
env, h6, h2, r |= (ens_ (x ~~> a \* Hf);; f)

r0: result

h4: heap

H16: (\[v1 = vunit] \* H1) h7
H14: h3 = h4 \u h7
H15: Fmap.disjoint h4 h7
env, h6 \u hxa, h2, r |= (ens_ Hf;; f)

    
f: flow
a, b: Val.value
H1, H2, Ha, Hf: hprop
x, y: loc
Hbi: biab Ha H1 H2 Hf
IHHbi: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req Ha (ens_ Hf;; f)
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r0: result
H4: env, h3, h2, r |= req (y ~~> b \* H2) f
h4: heap
r1: result
v0: val
hxa: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H: r1 = norm v0
H7: v0 = vunit
H8: (x ~~> a) hxa
H0: h4 = h1 \u hxa
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 hxa
hyb, h5: heap
H6: (y ~~> b) hyb
H9: h1 = h5 \u hyb
H10: Fmap.disjoint h5 hyb
hHa, h6: heap
H13: Ha hHa
H11: h5 = h6 \u hHa
H12: Fmap.disjoint h6 hHa
HensH0: env, h4, h3, r0 |= ens_ H1
v1: val
h7: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H5: r0 = norm v1
H16: v1 = vunit /\ H1 h7
H14: h3 = h4 \u h7
H15: Fmap.disjoint h4 h7
env, h6 \u hxa, h2, r |= (ens_ Hf;; f)

Hreduce: forall (env : senv)
  (h1 h hf : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value)
  (r : result)
  (H : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value -> Prop),
H h ->
Fmap.disjoint h (hf \u h1) ->
env, hf \u h1, hf \u h1 \u h, r |= ens_ H ->
env, h1, h1 \u h, r |= ens_ H
env, h6 \u hxa, h2, r |= (ens_ Hf;; f)

env, h5 \u hxa, (h5 \u hxa) \u h7, r0
|= ens_ H1
env, h6 \u hxa, h2, r |= (ens_ Hf;; f)

    
f: flow
a, b: Val.value
H1, H2, Ha, Hf: hprop
x, y: loc
Hbi: biab Ha H1 H2 Hf
IHHbi: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req Ha (ens_ Hf;; f)
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r0: result
H4: env, h3, h2, r |= req (y ~~> b \* H2) f
h4: heap
r1: result
v0: val
hxa: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H: r1 = norm v0
H7: v0 = vunit
H8: (x ~~> a) hxa
H0: h4 = h1 \u hxa
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 hxa
hyb, h5: heap
H6: (y ~~> b) hyb
H9: h1 = h5 \u hyb
H10: Fmap.disjoint h5 hyb
hHa, h6: heap
H13: Ha hHa
H11: h5 = h6 \u hHa
H12: Fmap.disjoint h6 hHa
h7: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
HensH0: env, h5 \u hxa, (h5 \u hxa) \u h7, r0
|= ens_ H1
v1: val
H5: r0 = norm v1
H16: v1 = vunit
H20: H1 h7
H14: h3 = h4 \u h7
H15: Fmap.disjoint h4 h7
Hreduce: env, hyb \u h5 \u hxa,
hyb \u (h5 \u hxa) \u h7, r0 |= 
ens_ H1 ->
env, h5 \u hxa, (h5 \u hxa) \u h7, r0
|= ens_ H1
env, h6 \u hxa, h2, r |= (ens_ Hf;; f)


    (* provide the heap for y~~>b *)

   env, h5 \u hxa, h3, r1 |= ens_ H1 /\
   env, h3, h2, r |= req H2 f) ->
env, h5 \u hxa, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f)
env, h5 \u hxa \u h7, h2, r |= req H2 f

      
f: flow
a, b: Val.value
H1, H2, Ha, Hf: hprop
x, y: loc
Hbi: biab Ha H1 H2 Hf
IHHbi: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req Ha (ens_ Hf;; f)
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r0: result
h4: heap
r1: result
v0: val
hxa: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H: r1 = norm v0
H7: v0 = vunit
H8: (x ~~> a) hxa
H0: h4 = h1 \u hxa
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 hxa
hyb, h5: heap
H6: (y ~~> b) hyb
H9: h1 = h5 \u hyb
H10: Fmap.disjoint h5 hyb
hHa, h6: heap
H13: Ha hHa
H11: h5 = h6 \u hHa
H12: Fmap.disjoint h6 hHa
h7: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
HensH0: env, h5 \u hxa, (h5 \u hxa) \u h7, r0
|= ens_ H1
v1: val
H5: r0 = norm v1
H16: v1 = vunit
H20: H1 h7
H14: h3 = h4 \u h7
H15: Fmap.disjoint h4 h7
Hreduce: env, hyb \u h5 \u hxa,
hyb \u (h5 \u hxa) \u h7, r0 |= 
ens_ H1 ->
env, h5 \u hxa, (h5 \u hxa) \u h7, r0
|= ens_ H1
H4: env, h5 \u hxa \u h7, h2, r |= req H2 f
Hseq: forall r : result,
(exists (h3 : heap) (r1 : result),
   env, h5 \u hxa, h3, r1 |= ens_ H1 /\
   env, h3, h2, r |= req H2 f) ->
env, h5 \u hxa, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f)
h5 \u hxa \u h7 = (h5 \u hxa) \u h7

r1: result

H: r1 = norm v0
H7: v0 = vunit

H0: h4 = h1 \u hxa

hyb, h5: heap
H6: (y ~~> b) hyb

Ha hp ->
h5 \u hxa = hr \u hp ->

env, hr, h2, r |= (ens_ Hf;; f)

f: flow
a, b: Val.value
H1, H2, Ha, Hf: hprop
x, y: loc
Hbi: biab Ha H1 H2 Hf
IHHbi: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= req Ha (ens_ Hf;; f)
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
h3: heap
r0: result
h4: heap
r1: result
v0: val
hxa: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
H: r1 = norm v0
H7: v0 = vunit
H8: (x ~~> a) hxa
H0: h4 = h1 \u hxa
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 hxa
hyb, h5: heap
H6: (y ~~> b) hyb
H9: h1 = h5 \u hyb
H10: Fmap.disjoint h5 hyb
hHa, h6: heap
H13: Ha hHa
H11: h5 = h6 \u hHa
H12: Fmap.disjoint h6 hHa
h7: Fmap.fmap loc Val.value
HensH0: env, h5 \u hxa, (h5 \u hxa) \u h7, r0
|= ens_ H1
v1: val
H5: r0 = norm v1
H16: v1 = vunit
H20: H1 h7
H14: h3 = h4 \u h7
H15: Fmap.disjoint h4 h7
Hreduce: env, hyb \u h5 \u hxa,
hyb \u (h5 \u hxa) \u h7, r0 |= 
ens_ H1 ->
env, h5 \u hxa, (h5 \u hxa) \u h7, r0
|= ens_ H1
H4: env, h5 \u hxa \u h7, h2, r |= req H2 f
Hseq: forall r : result,
(exists (h3 : heap) (r1 : result),
   env, h5 \u hxa, h3, r1 |= ens_ H1 /\
   env, h3, h2, r |= req H2 f) ->
env, h5 \u hxa, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f)
H17: env, h5 \u hxa, h2, r |= (ens_ H1;; req H2 f)
H26: forall hp hr : heap,
Ha hp ->
h5 \u hxa = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp ->
env, hr, h2, r |= (ens_ Hf;; f)
Fmap.disjoint (h6 \u hxa) hHa

    fmap_disjoint. }
Qed.

Module BiabductionExamples.
(a=3) × x→a×y→b |- x->3 × (y→b) 
  
forall x y : loc,
exists (Ha Hf : hprop) (a : int),
  biab Ha (x ~~> vint a \* y ~~> vint 2)
    (x ~~> vint 3) Hf

  
forall x y : loc,
exists (Ha Hf : hprop) (a : int),
  biab Ha (x ~~> vint a \* y ~~> vint 2)
    (x ~~> vint 3) Hf

    
x, y: loc
exists (Ha Hf : hprop) (a : int),
  biab Ha (x ~~> vint a \* y ~~> vint 2)
    (x ~~> vint 3) Hf

    
x, y: loc
exists (Hf : hprop) (a : int),
  biab ?Ha (x ~~> vint a \* y ~~> vint 2)
    (x ~~> vint 3) Hf

    
x, y: loc
exists a : int,
  biab ?Ha (x ~~> vint a \* y ~~> vint 2)
    (x ~~> vint 3) ?Hf

    
x, y: loc
biab ?Ha (x ~~> vint ?a \* y ~~> vint 2)
  (x ~~> vint 3) ?Hf

    
x, y: loc
biab ?Ha (x ~~> vint 3 \* y ~~> vint 2)
  (x ~~> vint 3 \* \[]) ?Hf

    
x, y: loc
biab ?Ha (y ~~> vint 2) \[] ?Hf

    apply b_base_empty.
  Qed.

  (* we can see from the ex_intro constrs that the frame is y->2, and the abduced contraint is trivial but gives a value to a, which was immediately substituted *)
  (* Print ex1_biab. *)

  
forall x y : loc,
exists Ha Hf : hprop,
  biab Ha (x ~~> vint 2) (y ~~> vint 3) Hf

  
forall x y : loc,
exists Ha Hf : hprop,
  biab Ha (x ~~> vint 2) (y ~~> vint 3) Hf

    
x, y: loc
exists Ha Hf : hprop,
  biab Ha (x ~~> vint 2) (y ~~> vint 3) Hf

    
x, y: loc
exists Hf : hprop,
  biab ?Ha (x ~~> vint 2) (y ~~> vint 3) Hf
 
x, y: loc
biab ?Ha (x ~~> vint 2) (y ~~> vint 3) ?Hf

    
x, y: loc
biab ?Ha (x ~~> vint 2 \* \[]) (y ~~> vint 3) ?Hf

    
x, y: loc
biab ?Ha (x ~~> vint 2 \* \[]) (y ~~> vint 3 \* \[])
  ?Hf

    
x, y: loc
H1: forall (a b : Val.value) (H1 H2 Ha Hf : hprop)
  (x y : loc),
biab Ha H1 H2 Hf ->
biab (y ~~> b \* Ha) (x ~~> a \* H1)
  (y ~~> b \* H2) (x ~~> a \* Hf)
biab ?Ha (x ~~> vint 2 \* \[]) (y ~~> vint 3 \* \[])
  ?Hf

    
x, y: loc
H1: forall (a b : Val.value) (H1 H2 Ha Hf : hprop)
  (x y : loc),
biab Ha H1 H2 Hf ->
biab (y ~~> b \* Ha) (x ~~> a \* H1)
  (y ~~> b \* H2) (x ~~> a \* Hf)
biab ?Ha \[] \[] ?Hf

    apply b_base_empty.
  Qed.

  (* Print ex2_biab. *)
Example from Appendex D of the paper 
  
forall (x y : loc) (a b : Val.value),
ens_ (x ~~> a);; req_ (y ~~> b)
⊑ intersect (req_ \[x = y /\ a = b])
    (req (y ~~> b) (ens_ (x ~~> a)))

  
forall (x y : loc) (a b : Val.value),
ens_ (x ~~> a);; req_ (y ~~> b)
⊑ intersect (req_ \[x = y /\ a = b])
    (req (y ~~> b) (ens_ (x ~~> a)))

    
x, y: loc
a, b: Val.value
ens_ (x ~~> a);; req_ (y ~~> b)
⊑ intersect (req_ \[x = y /\ a = b])
    (req (y ~~> b) (ens_ (x ~~> a)))

    
x, y: loc
a, b: Val.value
env: senv
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H: env, h1, h2, r
|= (ens_ (x ~~> a);; req_ (y ~~> b))
env, h1, h2, r |= req_ \[x = y /\ a = b]

forall hp hr : heap,

h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> env, hr, h2, r |= empty
