End BiabductionExamples.

Lemmas about entailment sequents

forall (f : flow) (A : Type) (fctx : A -> flow)
  (env : senv),
(forall x : A, env ⊢ f ⊑ fctx x) ->
env ⊢ f ⊑ ∀ x : A, fctx x


forall (f : flow) (A : Type) (fctx : A -> flow)
  (env : senv),
(forall x : A, env ⊢ f ⊑ fctx x) ->
env ⊢ f ⊑ ∀ x : A, fctx x

  
forall (f : flow) (A : Type) (fctx : A -> flow)
  (env : senv),
(forall (x : A) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= f -> env, h1, h2, r |= fctx x) ->
forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= f ->
env, h1, h2, r |= (∀ x : A, fctx x)
 
f: flow
A: Type
fctx: A -> flow
env: senv
H: forall (x : A) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= f -> env, h1, h2, r |= fctx x
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H0: env, h1, h2, r |= f
env, h1, h2, r |= (∀ x : A, fctx x)

  
f: flow
A: Type
fctx: A -> flow
env: senv
H: forall (x : A) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= f -> env, h1, h2, r |= fctx x
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H0: env, h1, h2, r |= f
forall v : A, env, h1, h2, r |= fctx v
 
f: flow
A: Type
fctx: A -> flow
env: senv
H: forall (x : A) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= f -> env, h1, h2, r |= fctx x
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H0: env, h1, h2, r |= f
x: A
env, h1, h2, r |= fctx x

  auto.
Qed.


forall (f : flow) (A : Type) (fctx : A -> flow)
  (env : senv),
(exists x : A, env ⊢ fctx x ⊑ f) ->
env ⊢ ∀ x : A, fctx x ⊑ f


forall (f : flow) (A : Type) (fctx : A -> flow)
  (env : senv),
(exists x : A, env ⊢ fctx x ⊑ f) ->
env ⊢ ∀ x : A, fctx x ⊑ f

  
forall (f : flow) (A : Type) (fctx : A -> flow)
  (env : senv),
(exists x : A,
   forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
   env, h1, h2, r |= fctx x -> env, h1, h2, r |= f) ->
forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (∀ x : A, fctx x) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= f

forall (f f1 : flow) (A : Type) (fctx : A -> flow)
  (env : senv),
(exists x : A, env ⊢ fctx x;; f1 ⊑ f) ->
env ⊢ (∀ x : A, fctx x);; f1 ⊑ f


forall (f f1 : flow) (A : Type) (fctx : A -> flow)
  (env : senv),
(exists x : A, env ⊢ fctx x;; f1 ⊑ f) ->
env ⊢ (∀ x : A, fctx x);; f1 ⊑ f

  
forall (f f1 : flow) (A : Type) (fctx : A -> flow)
  (env : senv),
(exists x : A,
   forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
   env, h1, h2, r |= (fctx x;; f1) ->
   env, h1, h2, r |= f) ->
forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= ((∀ x : A, fctx x);; f1) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= f

forall (f f1 : flow) (H : hprop) (env : senv),
env ⊢ ens_ H;; f ⊑ f1 -> env ⊢ f ⊑ req H f1


forall (f f1 : flow) (H : hprop) (env : senv),
env ⊢ ens_ H;; f ⊑ f1 -> env ⊢ f ⊑ req H f1

  
forall (f f1 : flow) (H : hprop) (env : senv),
(forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= (ens_ H;; f) ->
 env, h1, h2, r |= f1) ->
forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= f -> env, h1, h2, r |= req H f1
 
f, f1: flow
H: hprop
env: senv
H0: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),

env, h1, h2, r |= f1
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H1: env, h1, h2, r |= f
env, h1, h2, r |= req H f1

env, h1, h2, r |= f1
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H1: env, h1, h2, r |= f
forall hp hr : heap,
H hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> env, hr, h2, r |= f1

env, hr, h2, r |= f1

forall (env : senv) (f : var) (x r : val),
env ⊢ f$(x, r) ⊑ f$(x, r)


forall (env : senv) (f : var) (x r : val),
env ⊢ f$(x, r) ⊑ f$(x, r)

  
env: senv
f: var
x, r: val
env ⊢ f$(x, r) ⊑ f$(x, r)
 apply entails_under_refl.
Qed.


forall (env : Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)) (f : var)
  (x v : val) (f1 : ufun),
Fmap.read env f = Some f1 -> env ⊢ f$(x, v) ⊑ f1 x v


forall (env : Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)) (f : var)
  (x v : val) (f1 : ufun),
Fmap.read env f = Some f1 -> env ⊢ f$(x, v) ⊑ f1 x v

  
forall (env : Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)) (f : var)
  (x v : val) (f1 : ufun),
Fmap.read env f = Some f1 ->
forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (f$(x, v)) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= f1 x v

x, v: val
f1: ufun

h1, h2: heap
r: result

env, h1, h2, r |= f1 x v

forall (env : Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)) (v : val)
  (f1 : ufun) (f : var) (x : val),
Fmap.read env f = Some f1 -> env ⊢ f1 x v ⊑ f$(x, v)


forall (env : Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)) (v : val)
  (f1 : ufun) (f : var) (x : val),
Fmap.read env f = Some f1 -> env ⊢ f1 x v ⊑ f$(x, v)

  
forall (env : Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)) (v : val)
  (f1 : ufun) (f : var) (x : val),
Fmap.read env f = Some f1 ->
forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= f1 x v ->
env, h1, h2, r |= (f$(x, v))
 
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
v: val
f1: ufun
f: var
x: val
H: Fmap.read env f = Some f1
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H0: env, h1, h2, r |= f1 x v
env, h1, h2, r |= (f$(x, v))

  (* the converse is not possible to prove because reduction of a ufun
    returns an arbitrary flow, which isn't guaranteed to have the same
    result as [unk f]. the other direction is fine because of the semantics
    of unk.

    note that this is an implementation issue due to the use of hoas for ufuns;
    conceptually this is an equivalence.

    at the level of [satisfies], however, it is possible to go
    backwards if we constrain the result; see [unk_inv_bi]. this is also
    the reason we don't have bientails_under, as this is the only rule
    which uses it, and it would have to talk about the result. *)
Abort.


forall (fn : var) (fn1 : ufun) (f1 f2 : flow)
  (env : Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)) (x r : val),
Fmap.read env fn = Some fn1 ->
env ⊢ fn1 x r;; f1 ⊑ f2 -> env ⊢ (fn$(x, r));; f1 ⊑ f2


forall (fn : var) (fn1 : ufun) (f1 f2 : flow)
  (env : Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)) (x r : val),
Fmap.read env fn = Some fn1 ->
env ⊢ fn1 x r;; f1 ⊑ f2 -> env ⊢ (fn$(x, r));; f1 ⊑ f2

  
fn: var
fn1: ufun
f1, f2: flow
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
x, r: val
H: Fmap.read env fn = Some fn1
H0: env ⊢ fn1 x r;; f1 ⊑ f2
env ⊢ (fn$(x, r));; f1 ⊑ f2

  
fn: var
fn1: ufun
f1, f2: flow
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
x, r: val
H: Fmap.read env fn = Some fn1
H0: env ⊢ fn1 x r;; f1 ⊑ f2
env ⊢ fn1 x r;; f1 ⊑ f2

  assumption.
Qed.


forall (env : Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)) (f : var)
  (x : val) (A : Type) (vv : A -> val) (f1 : ufun),
Fmap.read env f = Some f1 ->
env ⊢ ∃ v : A, (f$(x, vv v)) ⊑ ∃ v : A, f1 x (vv v)


forall (env : Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)) (f : var)
  (x : val) (A : Type) (vv : A -> val) (f1 : ufun),
Fmap.read env f = Some f1 ->
env ⊢ ∃ v : A, (f$(x, vv v)) ⊑ ∃ v : A, f1 x (vv v)

  
forall (env : Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)) (f : var)
  (x : val) (A : Type) (vv : A -> val) (f1 : ufun),
Fmap.read env f = Some f1 ->
forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (∃ v : A, (f$(x, vv v))) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= (∃ v : A, f1 x (vv v))

f: var
x: val
A: Type
vv: A -> val
f1: ufun
H: Fmap.read env f = Some f1
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H0: env, h1, h2, r |= (∃ v : A, (f$(x, vv v)))
env, h1, h2, r |= (∃ v : A, f1 x (vv v))

f1: ufun

h1, h2: heap
r: result
H0: exists v : A, env, h1, h2, r |= (f$(x, vv v))
env, h1, h2, r |= (∃ v : A, f1 x (vv v))

env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)

A: Type

env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
f: var
x: val
A: Type
vv: A -> val

H: Fmap.read env f = Some f1
h1, h2: heap

v: A
H1: env, h1, h2, r |= (f$(x, vv v))
H0: forall (f : var) (x v : val) (f1 : ufun),
Fmap.read env f = Some f1 ->
env, h1, h2, r |= (f$(x, v)) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= f1 x v
env, h1, h2, r |= f1 x (vv v)

  specializes H0 f x (vv v) f1.
Qed.


forall (env : Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)) (f : var)
  (x : val) (A : Type) (vv : A -> val) (f1 : ufun)
  (f2 : A -> flow),
Fmap.read env f = Some f1 ->
env ⊢ ∃ v : A, (f$(x, vv v));; f2 v
⊑ ∃ v : A, f1 x (vv v);; f2 v


forall (env : Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)) (f : var)
  (x : val) (A : Type) (vv : A -> val) (f1 : ufun)
  (f2 : A -> flow),
Fmap.read env f = Some f1 ->
env ⊢ ∃ v : A, (f$(x, vv v));; f2 v
⊑ ∃ v : A, f1 x (vv v);; f2 v

  
forall (env : Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)) (f : var)
  (x : val) (A : Type) (vv : A -> val) (f1 : ufun)
  (f2 : A -> flow),
Fmap.read env f = Some f1 ->
forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (∃ v : A, (f$(x, vv v));; f2 v) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= (∃ v : A, f1 x (vv v);; f2 v)
 
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
f: var
x: val
A: Type
vv: A -> val
f1: ufun
f2: A -> flow
H: Fmap.read env f = Some f1
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H0: env, h1, h2, r |= (∃ v : A, (f$(x, vv v));; f2 v)
env, h1, h2, r |= (∃ v : A, f1 x (vv v);; f2 v)

  
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
f: var
x: val
A: Type
vv: A -> val
f1: ufun
f2: A -> flow
H: Fmap.read env f = Some f1
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H0: exists v : A,
  env, h1, h2, r |= ((f$(x, vv v));; f2 v)
env, h1, h2, r |= (∃ v : A, f1 x (vv v);; f2 v)
 
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
f: var
x: val
A: Type
vv: A -> val
f1: ufun
f2: A -> flow
H: Fmap.read env f = Some f1
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: A
H1: env, h1, h2, r |= ((f$(x, vv v));; f2 v)
env, h1, h2, r |= (∃ v : A, f1 x (vv v);; f2 v)

  
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
f: var
x: val
A: Type
vv: A -> val
f1: ufun
f2: A -> flow
H: Fmap.read env f = Some f1
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: A
H1: exists (h3 : heap) (r1 : result),
  env, h1, h3, r1 |= (f$(x, vv v)) /\
  env, h3, h2, r |= f2 v
env, h1, h2, r |= (∃ v : A, f1 x (vv v);; f2 v)
 
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
f: var
x: val
A: Type
vv: A -> val
f1: ufun
f2: A -> flow
H: Fmap.read env f = Some f1
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: A
h3: heap
r1: result
H0: env, h1, h3, r1 |= (f$(x, vv v))
H2: env, h3, h2, r |= f2 v
env, h1, h2, r |= (∃ v : A, f1 x (vv v);; f2 v)

  
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
f: var
x: val
A: Type
vv: A -> val
f1: ufun
f2: A -> flow
H: Fmap.read env f = Some f1
h1, h2: heap
r: result
v: A
h3: heap
r1: result
H0: env, h1, h3, r1 |= (f$(x, vv v))
H2: env, h3, h2, r |= f2 v
exists v : A, env, h1, h2, r |= (f1 x (vv v);; f2 v)

H2: env, h3, h2, r |= f2 v
env, h1, h2, r |= (f1 x (vv v);; f2 v)

 env, h1, h2, r |= f2 -> env, h1, h2, r |= f3) ->

r: result

env, h1, h2, r |= f3

Qed.

forall (A : Type) (f1 : A -> flow) (f2 f3 : flow)
  (env : senv),
(forall x : A, env ⊢ f1 x;; f2 ⊑ f3) ->
env ⊢ (∃ x : A, f1 x);; f2 ⊑ f3


forall (A : Type) (f1 : A -> flow) (f2 f3 : flow)
  (env : senv),
(forall x : A, env ⊢ f1 x;; f2 ⊑ f3) ->
env ⊢ (∃ x : A, f1 x);; f2 ⊑ f3

  
forall (A : Type) (f1 : A -> flow) (f2 f3 : flow)
  (env : senv),
(forall (x : A) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= (f1 x;; f2) -> env, h1, h2, r |= f3) ->
forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= ((∃ x : A, f1 x);; f2) ->
env, h1, h2, r |= f3
 
A: Type
f1: A -> flow
f2, f3: flow
env: senv
H: forall (x : A) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= (f1 x;; f2) ->

  (f : flow),

  (f : flow),

⊑ ∃ x : A, ens_ (c x);; f

A: Type

f: flow
h1, h2: heap

h3: heap
r1: result
H1: env, h3, h2, r |= f
H0: exists (v : val) (h4 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value),
  r1 = norm v /\
  (\[v = vunit] \* \exists x : A, c x) h4 /\
  h3 = h1 \u h4 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h4
env, h1, h2, r |= (∃ x : A, ens_ (c x);; f)

forall (env : senv) (f f1 : flow),
env ⊢ f ⊑ f1 -> env ⊢ req \[] f ⊑ f1

env ⊢ f ⊑ f1 -> env ⊢ req \[] f ⊑ f1

  
forall (env : senv) (f f1 : flow),
(forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= f -> env, h1, h2, r |= f1) ->
forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= req \[] f -> env, h1, h2, r |= f1
 
env: senv
f, f1: flow
H: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= f -> env, h1, h2, r |= f1
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H0: env, h1, h2, r |= req \[] f
env, h1, h2, r |= f1

  
env: senv
f, f1: flow
H: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= f -> env, h1, h2, r |= f1
h1, h2: heap
r: result
H0: forall hp hr : heap,
\[] hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> env, hr, h2, r |= f
env, h1, h2, r |= f1
 
env: senv
f, f1: flow
H: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= f -> env, h1, h2, r |= f1
h1, h2: heap
r: result
\[] empty_heap

  apply hempty_intro.
Qed.

Big-step semantics

Inductive eresult : Type :=
  | enorm : val -> eresult.
Program environment 
Definition penv := Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr)).
Definition empty_penv : penv := Fmap.empty.

Inductive bigstep : penv -> heap -> expr -> heap -> eresult -> Prop :=
  | eval_pval : forall h v env,
    bigstep env h (pval v) h (enorm v)

  (* there is no var rule *)

  | eval_plet : forall h1 h3 h2 x e1 e2 v r env,
    bigstep env h1 e1 h3 (enorm v) ->
    bigstep env h3 (subst x v e2) h2 r ->
    bigstep env h1 (plet x e1 e2) h2 r

  | eval_padd : forall h x y env,
    bigstep env h (padd (pval (vint x)) (pval (vint y))) h (enorm (vint (x + y)))

  | eval_pminus : forall h x y env,
    bigstep env h (pminus (pval (vint x)) (pval (vint y))) h (enorm (vint (x - y)))

  | eval_pfun : forall h x e env,
    bigstep env h (pfun x e) h (enorm (vfun x e))

  | eval_pfix : forall h x e f env,
    bigstep env h (pfix f x e) h (enorm (vfix f x e))

  | eval_app_fun : forall v1 v2 h x e r env,
    v1 = vfun x e ->
    bigstep env h (subst x v2 e) h r ->
    bigstep env h (papp (pval v1) (pval v2)) h r

  | eval_app_fix : forall v1 v2 h x e r fn env,
    v1 = vfix fn x e ->
    bigstep env h (subst x v2 (subst fn v1 e)) h r ->
    bigstep env h (papp (pval v1) (pval v2)) h r

  | eval_app_unk : forall va h r f fn env,
    Fmap.read env fn = Some f ->
    bigstep env h (f va) h r ->
    bigstep env h (papp (pvar fn) (pval va)) h r

  | eval_pif_true : forall h1 h2 r e1 e2 env,
    bigstep env h1 e1 h2 r ->
    bigstep env h1 (pif (pval (vbool true)) e1 e2) h2 r

  | eval_pif_false : forall h1 h2 r e1 e2 env,
    bigstep env h1 e2 h2 r ->
    bigstep env h1 (pif (pval (vbool false)) e1 e2) h2 r

  | eval_pref : forall h v p env,
    ~ Fmap.indom h p ->
    bigstep env h (pref (pval v)) (Fmap.update h p v) (enorm (vloc p))

  | eval_pderef : forall h p env,
    Fmap.indom h p ->
    bigstep env h (pderef (pval (vloc p))) h (enorm (Fmap.read h p))

  | eval_passign : forall h p v env,
    Fmap.indom h p ->
    bigstep env h (passign (pval (vloc p)) (pval v)) (Fmap.update h p v) (enorm vunit)

  | eval_passert : forall h env,
    bigstep env h (passert (pval (vbool true))) h (enorm vunit).

(* Definition compatible r1 r2 :=
  match (r1, r2) with
  | (norm r3, enorm r4) => r3 = r4
end. *)

Program logic rules

Inductive forward : expr -> flow -> Prop :=
  | fw_val: forall n,
    forward (pval n) (ens (fun res => \[res = n]))

  (* there is no need for fw_var/a store because substitution will take care of it before it is reached *)

  | fw_let: forall x e1 e2 f1 f2 v,
    forward e1 f1 ->
    flow_res f1 v ->
    forward (subst x v e2) f2 ->
    forward (plet x e1 e2) (f1 ;; f2)

  | fw_if: forall b e1 e2 f1 f2,
    forward e1 f1 ->
    forward e2 f2 ->
    forward (pif b e1 e2) (disj f1 f2)

  | fw_deref: forall x,
    forward (pderef (pval (vloc x)))
      (fall (fun y => (req (x~~>y)
        (ens (fun res => \[res = y] \* x~~>y)))))

  | fw_ref: forall v,
    forward (pref (pval v)) (fex (fun y =>
      (ens (fun r => \[r = vloc y] \* y~~>v))))

  | fw_assign: forall x y v,
    forward (passign (pval (vloc x)) (pval y))
      (req (x~~>v) (ens_ (x~~>y)))

  | fw_assert: forall b,
    forward (passert (pval (vbool b))) (req_ \[b = true])

  | fw_app_fun: forall vf x e va f,
    vf = vfun x e ->
    forward (subst x va e) f ->
    forward (papp (pval vf) (pval va)) f

  | fw_app_fix: forall vf x e va f fn,
    vf = vfix fn x e ->
    forward (subst x va (subst fn vf e)) f ->
    forward (papp (pval vf) (pval va)) f

  | fw_app_unk: forall f va,
    forward (papp (pvar f) (pval va)) (fex (fun r => unk f va r)).


Module Soundness.

Semantic tuples
A semantic tuple is our equivalent of a Hoare triple: a valid one ensures ensures that the given program satisfies the given specification.
The use of "tuple" alludes to the fact that we may constrain the program with an arbitrary number of pre- and postconditions. 
  Definition tuple_valid_under penv env e f : Prop :=
    forall h1 h2 v,
      bigstep penv h1 e h2 (enorm v) -> satisfies env h1 h2 (norm v) f.
Roughly, this says that for every binding in the program environment, we can find a "corresponding" one in the spec environment, where "corresponding" means related by a valid semantic tuple. 
  Definition env_compatible penv env :=
    forall pfn f x,
      Fmap.read penv f = Some pfn ->
      exists sfn, Fmap.read env f = Some sfn /\
      forall v, tuple_valid_under penv env (pfn x) (sfn x v).
The full definition requires compatible environments. 
  Definition sem_tuple (e: expr) (f: flow) : Prop :=
    forall penv env,
      env_compatible penv env -> tuple_valid_under penv env e f.

  
Proper (respectful eq (respectful entails impl))
  sem_tuple

  
Proper (respectful eq (respectful entails impl))
  sem_tuple

    
forall x y : expr,
x = y ->
forall x0 y0 : flow,
(forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= x0 -> env, h1, h2, r |= y0) ->
(forall (penv : Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr)))
   (env : Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)),
 env_compatible penv env ->
 forall (h1 h2 : heap) (v : val),
 bigstep penv h1 x h2 (enorm v) ->
 env, h1, h2, norm v |= x0) ->
forall (penv : Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)),
env_compatible penv env ->
forall (h1 h2 : heap) (v : val),
bigstep penv h1 y h2 (enorm v) ->
env, h1, h2, norm v |= y0

    
x, y: expr
H: x = y
x0, y0: flow
H0: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= x0 -> env, h1, h2, r |= y0
H1: forall
  (penv : Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)),
env_compatible penv env ->
forall (h1 h2 : heap) (v : val),
bigstep penv h1 x h2 (enorm v) ->
env, h1, h2, norm v |= x0
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
H2: env_compatible penv0 env
h1, h2: heap
v: val
H3: bigstep penv0 h1 y h2 (enorm v)
env, h1, h2, norm v |= y0
 
y: expr
x0, y0: flow
H0: forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
env, h1, h2, r |= x0 -> env, h1, h2, r |= y0
H1: forall
  (penv : Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)),
env_compatible penv env ->
forall (h1 h2 : heap) (v : val),
bigstep penv h1 y h2 (enorm v) ->
env, h1, h2, norm v |= x0
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
H2: env_compatible penv0 env
h1, h2: heap
v: val
H3: bigstep penv0 h1 y h2 (enorm v)
env, h1, h2, norm v |= y0

    eauto.
  Qed.
Structural rules 
  
forall (f1 f2 : flow) (e : expr),
f2 ⊑ f1 -> sem_tuple e f2 -> sem_tuple e f1

  
forall (f1 f2 : flow) (e : expr),
f2 ⊑ f1 -> sem_tuple e f2 -> sem_tuple e f1

    
f1, f2: flow
e: expr
He: f2 ⊑ f1
H: sem_tuple e f2
sem_tuple e f1

    
f1, f2: flow
e: expr
He: f2 ⊑ f1
H: sem_tuple e f2
forall (penv : Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)),
env_compatible penv env ->
tuple_valid_under penv env e f1
 
f1, f2: flow
e: expr
He: f2 ⊑ f1
H: sem_tuple e f2
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
H0: env_compatible penv0 env
tuple_valid_under penv0 env e f1

    
f1, f2: flow
e: expr
He: f2 ⊑ f1
H: sem_tuple e f1
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
H0: env_compatible penv0 env
tuple_valid_under penv0 env e f1

    eauto.
  Qed.
Rules for program constructs 
  
forall n : val,
sem_tuple (pval n) (ens res. \[res = n])

  
forall n : val,
sem_tuple (pval n) (ens res. \[res = n])

    
forall (n : val)
  (penv : Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)),
env_compatible penv env ->
tuple_valid_under penv env (pval n)
  (ens res. \[res = n])
 
n: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h1, h2: heap
v: val
Hb: bigstep penv0 h1 (pval n) h2 (enorm v)
env, h1, h2, norm v |= (ens res. \[res = n])

    (* appeal to how e executes to tell us about the heaps *)
    
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h2: heap
v: val
env, h2, h2, norm v |= (ens res. \[res = v])

    (* justify that the staged formula describes the heap *)
    
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h2: heap
v: val
v = v

    reflexivity.
  Qed.

  
forall (x : var) (e1 e2 : expr) (f1 f2 : flow)
  (v : val),
sem_tuple e1 f1 ->
flow_res f1 v ->
sem_tuple (subst x v e2) f2 ->
sem_tuple (plet x e1 e2) (f1;; f2)

  (v : val),
sem_tuple e1 f1 ->
flow_res f1 v ->
sem_tuple (subst x v e2) f2 ->
sem_tuple (plet x e1 e2) (f1;; f2)

forall (b e1 e2 : expr) (f1 f2 : flow),
sem_tuple e1 f1 ->
sem_tuple e2 f2 ->
sem_tuple (pif b e1 e2) (disj f1 f2)

  
forall (b e1 e2 : expr) (f1 f2 : flow),
sem_tuple e1 f1 ->
sem_tuple e2 f2 ->
sem_tuple (pif b e1 e2) (disj f1 f2)

    
b, e1, e2: expr
f1, f2: flow
Ht: sem_tuple e1 f1
Hf: sem_tuple e2 f2
sem_tuple (pif b e1 e2) (disj f1 f2)

    
b, e1, e2: expr
f1, f2: flow
Ht: sem_tuple e1 f1
Hf: sem_tuple e2 f2
forall (penv : Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)),
env_compatible penv env ->
tuple_valid_under penv env (pif b e1 e2) (disj f1 f2)
 
b, e1, e2: expr
f1, f2: flow
Ht: sem_tuple e1 f1
Hf: sem_tuple e2 f2
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h1, h2: heap
v: val
Hb: bigstep penv0 h1 (pif b e1 e2) h2 (enorm v)
env, h1, h2, norm v |= disj f1 f2

f1, f2: flow
Ht: sem_tuple e1 f1
Hf: sem_tuple e2 f2

env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h1, h2: heap
v: val
Hb: bigstep penv0 h1 e1 h2 (enorm v)
env, h1, h2, norm v |= disj f1 f2

tuple_valid_under penv env e1 f1
Hf: sem_tuple e2 f2

env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)

h1, h2: heap
v: val
Hb: bigstep penv0 h1 e1 h2 (enorm v)
Ht: env, h1, h2, norm v |= f1
env, h1, h2, norm v |= disj f1 f2

      now apply s_disj_l. 
e1, e2: expr
f1, f2: flow
Ht: sem_tuple e1 f1

      now apply s_disj_r. }

forall x : Logic.loc,
sem_tuple (pderef (pval (vloc x)))
  (∀ y : Val.value,
     req (x ~~> y) (ens res. \[res = y] \* x ~~> y))

  
forall x : Logic.loc,
sem_tuple (pderef (pval (vloc x)))
  (∀ y : Val.value,
     req (x ~~> y) (ens res. \[res = y] \* x ~~> y))

    
x: Logic.loc
sem_tuple (pderef (pval (vloc x)))
  (∀ y : Val.value,
     req (x ~~> y) (ens res. \[res = y] \* x ~~> y))
 
x: Logic.loc
forall (penv : Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)),
env_compatible penv env ->
tuple_valid_under penv env (pderef (pval (vloc x)))
  (∀ y : Val.value,
     req (x ~~> y) (ens res. \[res = y] \* x ~~> y))
 
x: Logic.loc
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h1, h2: heap
v: val
Hb: bigstep penv0 h1 (pderef (pval (vloc x))) h2
  (enorm v)
env, h1, h2, norm v
|= (∀ y : Val.value,
      req (x ~~> y) (ens res. \[res = y] \* x ~~> y))

    
x: Logic.loc
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h2: heap
Hb: Fmap.indom h2 x
env, h2, h2, norm (Fmap.read h2 x)
|= (∀ y : Val.value,
      req (x ~~> y) (ens res. \[res = y] \* x ~~> y))

    
x: Logic.loc
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h2: heap
Hb: Fmap.indom h2 x
forall v : Val.value,
env, h2, h2, norm (Fmap.read h2 x)
|= req (x ~~> v) (ens res. \[res = v] \* x ~~> v)
 
x: Logic.loc
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h2: heap
Hb: Fmap.indom h2 x
v: Val.value
env, h2, h2, norm (Fmap.read h2 x)
|= req (x ~~> v) (ens res. \[res = v] \* x ~~> v)

    
x: Logic.loc
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h2: heap
Hb: Fmap.indom h2 x
v: Val.value
forall hp hr : heap,
(x ~~> v) hp ->
h2 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp ->
env, hr, h2, norm (Fmap.read h2 x)
|= (ens res. \[res = v] \* x ~~> v)
 
x: Logic.loc
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h2: heap
Hb: Fmap.indom h2 x
v: Val.value
hp, hr: heap
H: (x ~~> v) hp
H0: h2 = hr \u hp
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
env, hr, h2, norm (Fmap.read h2 x)
|= (ens res. \[res = v] \* x ~~> v)

    
x: Logic.loc
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h2: heap
Hb: Fmap.indom h2 x
v: Val.value
hp, hr: heap
H: (x ~~> v) hp
H0: h2 = hr \u hp
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
exists (v0 : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value),
  norm (Fmap.read h2 x) = norm v0 /\
  (\[v0 = v] \* x ~~> v) h3 /\
  h2 = hr \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint hr h3
 
x: Logic.loc
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h2: heap
Hb: Fmap.indom h2 x
v: Val.value
hp, hr: heap
H: (x ~~> v) hp
H0: h2 = hr \u hp
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
exists h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value,
  norm (Fmap.read h2 x) = norm v /\
  (\[v = v] \* x ~~> v) h3 /\
  h2 = hr \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint hr h3

h2: heap
Hb: Fmap.indom h2 x
v: Val.value
hp, hr: heap
H: (x ~~> v) hp
H0: h2 = hr \u hp
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
norm (Fmap.read h2 x) = norm v /\
(\[v = v] \* x ~~> v) hp /\
h2 = hr \u hp /\ Fmap.disjoint hr hp

x: Logic.loc
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
v: Val.value
hr: heap
Hb: Fmap.indom (hr \u Fmap.single x v) x
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr (Fmap.single x v)
Fmap.read (hr \u Fmap.single x v) x = v

v: Val.value

Hb: Fmap.indom (hr \u Fmap.single x v) x
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr (Fmap.single x v)
Fmap.read (Fmap.single x v \u hr) x = v

Fmap.indom (Fmap.single x v) x

      apply Fmap.indom_single.

penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h2: heap

v: Val.value
hp, hr: heap
H: (x ~~> v) hp
H0: h2 = hr \u hp
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
(\[v = v] \* x ~~> v) hp

x: Logic.loc
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h2: heap
Hb: Fmap.indom h2 x
v: Val.value
hp, hr: heap
H: (x ~~> v) hp
H0: h2 = hr \u hp
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
v = v /\ (x ~~> v) hp

      intuition. }
  Qed.

  
forall v : val,
sem_tuple (pref (pval v))
  (∃ y : Logic.loc, (ens r. \[r = vloc y] \* y ~~> v))

  
forall v : val,
sem_tuple (pref (pval v))
  (∃ y : Logic.loc, (ens r. \[r = vloc y] \* y ~~> v))

    
v: val
sem_tuple (pref (pval v))
  (∃ y : Logic.loc, (ens r. \[r = vloc y] \* y ~~> v))

    
v: val
forall (penv : Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)),
env_compatible penv env ->
tuple_valid_under penv env (pref (pval v))
  (∃ y : Logic.loc, (ens r. \[r = vloc y] \* y ~~> v))
 
v: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h1, h2: heap
v0: val
Hb: bigstep penv0 h1 (pref (pval v)) h2 (enorm v0)
env, h1, h2, norm v0
|= (∃ y : Logic.loc, (ens r. \[r = vloc y] \* y ~~> v))

    
v: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h1: heap
p: loc
Hb: ~ Fmap.indom h1 p
env, h1, Fmap.update h1 p v, norm (vloc p)
|= (∃ y : Logic.loc, (ens r. \[r = vloc y] \* y ~~> v))

    
v: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h1: heap
p: loc
Hb: ~ Fmap.indom h1 p
exists v0 : Logic.loc,
  env, h1, Fmap.update h1 p v, norm (vloc p)
  |= (ens r. \[r = vloc v0] \* v0 ~~> v)
 
v: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h1: heap
p: loc
Hb: ~ Fmap.indom h1 p
env, h1, Fmap.update h1 p v, norm (vloc p)
|= (ens r. \[r = vloc p] \* p ~~> v)

    
v: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h1: heap
p: loc
Hb: ~ Fmap.indom h1 p
exists (v0 : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value),
  norm (vloc p) = norm v0 /\
  (\[v0 = vloc p] \* p ~~> v) h3 /\
  Fmap.update h1 p v = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
 
v: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h1: heap
p: loc
Hb: ~ Fmap.indom h1 p
exists h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value,
  norm (vloc p) = norm (vloc p) /\
  (\[vloc p = vloc p] \* p ~~> v) h3 /\
  Fmap.update h1 p v = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
 
v: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h1: heap
p: loc
Hb: ~ Fmap.indom h1 p
norm (vloc p) = norm (vloc p) /\
(\[vloc p = vloc p] \* p ~~> v) (Fmap.single p v) /\
Fmap.update h1 p v = h1 \u Fmap.single p v /\
Fmap.disjoint h1 (Fmap.single p v)

    
v: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h1: heap
p: loc
Hb: ~ Fmap.indom h1 p
~ Fmap.indom h1 p
v: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h1: heap
p: loc
Hb: ~ Fmap.indom h1 p
H1: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single p v) h1
norm (vloc p) = norm (vloc p) /\
(\[vloc p = vloc p] \* p ~~> v) (Fmap.single p v) /\
Fmap.update h1 p v = h1 \u Fmap.single p v /\
Fmap.disjoint h1 (Fmap.single p v)

    
v: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h1: heap
p: loc
Hb: ~ Fmap.indom h1 p
~ Fmap.indom h1 p

env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h1: heap
p: loc
Hb: ~ Fmap.indom h1 p
Fmap.indom h1 p -> False
 exact Hb. 
v: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h1: heap
p: loc
Hb: ~ Fmap.indom h1 p
H1: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single p v) h1
norm (vloc p) = norm (vloc p) /\
(\[vloc p = vloc p] \* p ~~> v) (Fmap.single p v) /\
Fmap.update h1 p v = h1 \u Fmap.single p v /\
Fmap.disjoint h1 (Fmap.single p v)


    
v: val

env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)

p: loc
Hb: Fmap.indom h1 p -> False

(\[vloc p = vloc p] \* p ~~> v) (Fmap.single p v)

v: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h1: heap

Hb: Fmap.indom h1 p -> False

vloc p = vloc p /\ (p ~~> v) (Fmap.single p v)

penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env

p: loc
Hb: Fmap.indom h1 p -> False
H1: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single p v) h1
(p ~~> v) (Fmap.single p v)

      apply hsingle_intro.

penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h1: heap
p: loc
Hb: Fmap.indom h1 p -> False
H1: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single p v) h1
Fmap.update h1 p v = h1 \u Fmap.single p v

    
v: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h1: heap
p: loc
Hb: Fmap.indom h1 p -> False
H1: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single p v) h1
Fmap.update h1 p v = h1 \u Fmap.single p v
 
v: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h1: heap
p: loc
Hb: Fmap.indom h1 p -> False
H1: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single p v) h1
Fmap.update h1 p v = Fmap.single p v \u h1

      apply Fmap.update_eq_union_single. }
  Qed.

  
forall (x : Logic.loc) (y : val) (v : Val.value),
sem_tuple (passign (pval (vloc x)) (pval y))
  (req (x ~~> v) (ens_ (x ~~> y)))

  
forall (x : Logic.loc) (y : val) (v : Val.value),
sem_tuple (passign (pval (vloc x)) (pval y))
  (req (x ~~> v) (ens_ (x ~~> y)))

y: val
v: Val.value
sem_tuple (passign (pval (vloc x)) (pval y))
  (req (x ~~> v) (ens_ (x ~~> y)))

    
x: Logic.loc
y: val
v: Val.value
forall (penv : Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)),
env_compatible penv env ->
tuple_valid_under penv env
  (passign (pval (vloc x)) (pval y))
  (req (x ~~> v) (ens_ (x ~~> y)))
 
x: Logic.loc
y: val
v: Val.value
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h1, h2: heap
v0: val
Hb: bigstep penv0 h1
  (passign (pval (vloc x)) (pval y)) h2
  (enorm v0)
env, h1, h2, norm v0 |= req (x ~~> v) (ens_ (x ~~> y))

    
x: Logic.loc
y: val
v: Val.value
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h1: heap
Hb: Fmap.indom h1 x
env, h1, Fmap.update h1 x y, norm vunit
|= req (x ~~> v) (ens_ (x ~~> y))

    
x: Logic.loc
y: val
v: Val.value
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h1: heap
Hb: Fmap.indom h1 x
forall hp hr : heap,
(x ~~> v) hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp ->
env, hr, Fmap.update h1 x y, norm vunit
|= ens_ (x ~~> y)
 
x: Logic.loc
y: val
v: Val.value
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h1: heap
Hb: Fmap.indom h1 x
hp, hr: heap
H: (x ~~> v) hp
H0: h1 = hr \u hp
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
env, hr, Fmap.update h1 x y, norm vunit
|= ens_ (x ~~> y)

    
x: Logic.loc
y: val
v: Val.value
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h1: heap
Hb: Fmap.indom h1 x
hp, hr: heap
H: (x ~~> v) hp
H0: h1 = hr \u hp
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
exists (v : val) (h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value),
  norm vunit = norm v /\
  (\[v = vunit] \* x ~~> y) h3 /\
  Fmap.update h1 x y = hr \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint hr h3

h1: heap

hp, hr: heap
H: (x ~~> v) hp
H0: h1 = hr \u hp
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
exists h3 : Fmap.fmap loc Val.value,
  norm vunit = norm vunit /\
  (\[vunit = vunit] \* x ~~> y) h3 /\
  Fmap.update h1 x y = hr \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint hr h3
 
x: Logic.loc
y: val
v: Val.value
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)

h1: heap
Hb: Fmap.indom h1 x
hp, hr: heap
H: (x ~~> v) hp
H0: h1 = hr \u hp
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
norm vunit = norm vunit /\
(\[vunit = vunit] \* x ~~> y) (Fmap.update hp x y) /\
Fmap.update h1 x y = hr \u Fmap.update hp x y /\
Fmap.disjoint hr (Fmap.update hp x y)

forall b : bool,
sem_tuple (passert (pval (vbool b)))
  (req_ \[b = true])

  (req_ \[b = true])

  (req_ \[b = true])

    
b: bool
forall (penv : Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)),
env_compatible penv env ->
tuple_valid_under penv env (passert (pval (vbool b)))
  (req_ \[b = true])
 
b: bool
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h1, h2: heap

  (enorm v)
env, h1, h2, norm v |= req_ \[b = true]

env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h2: heap
env, h2, h2, norm vunit |= req_ \[true = true]

    
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h2: heap
forall hp hr : heap,
\[true = true] hp ->
h2 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp ->
env, hr, h2, norm vunit |= empty

    
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h2, hp, hr: heap
H: \[true = true] hp
H0: h2 = hr \u hp
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
env, hr, h2, norm vunit |= empty

env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h2, hp, hr: heap
H: true = true /\ hp = Fmap.empty
H0: h2 = hr \u hp
H1: Fmap.disjoint hr hp
env, hr, h2, norm vunit |= empty

  Qed.

  
forall (vf : val) (x : var) (e : expr) (va : val)
  (f : flow),
vf = vfun x e ->
sem_tuple (subst x va e) f ->
sem_tuple (papp (pval vf) (pval va)) f

  
forall (vf : val) (x : var) (e : expr) (va : val)
  (f : flow),
vf = vfun x e ->
sem_tuple (subst x va e) f ->
sem_tuple (papp (pval vf) (pval va)) f

    
vf: val
x: var
e: expr
va: val
f: flow
H: vf = vfun x e
H0: sem_tuple (subst x va e) f
sem_tuple (papp (pval vf) (pval va)) f

e: expr
va: val
f: flow
H0: sem_tuple (subst x va e) f
sem_tuple (papp (pval (vfun x e)) (pval va)) f

e: expr
va: val
f: flow
H0: sem_tuple (subst x va e) f

  (papp (pval (vfun x e)) (pval va)) f
 
x: var
e: expr
va: val
f: flow
H0: sem_tuple (subst x va e) f
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h1, h2: heap
v: val
Hb: bigstep penv0 h1
  (papp (pval (vfun x e)) (pval va)) h2 
  (enorm v)
env, h1, h2, norm v |= f

    
x: var
e: expr
va: val
f: flow
H0: sem_tuple (subst x va e) f
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h2: heap
v: val
forall (x0 : var) (e0 : expr),
vfun x e = vfun x0 e0 ->
bigstep penv0 h2 (subst x0 va e0) h2 (enorm v) ->
env, h2, h2, norm v |= f
x: var
e: expr
va: val
f: flow
H0: sem_tuple (subst x va e) f
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h2: heap
v: val
forall (x0 : var) (e0 : expr) (fn : var),
vfun x e = vfix fn x0 e0 ->
bigstep penv0 h2
  (subst x0 va (subst fn (vfun x e) e0)) h2 
  (enorm v) -> env, h2, h2, norm v |= f

    
x: var
e: expr
va: val
f: flow
H0: sem_tuple (subst x va e) f
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h2: heap
v: val
forall (x0 : var) (e0 : expr),
vfun x e = vfun x0 e0 ->
bigstep penv0 h2 (subst x0 va e0) h2 (enorm v) ->
env, h2, h2, norm v |= f

sem_tuple (papp (pval vf) (pval va)) f

sem_tuple (papp (pvar f) (pval va))
  (∃ r : val, (f$(va, r)))

  (∃ r : val, (f$(va, r)))

  (env : Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)),

f: var
va: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h1, h2: heap
v: val
Hb: bigstep penv0 h1 (papp (pvar f) (pval va)) h2
  (enorm v)
env, h1, h2, norm v |= (∃ r : val, (f$(va, r)))

va: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
h2: heap
v: val
forall f0 : val -> expr,
Fmap.read penv0 f = Some f0 ->
bigstep penv0 h2 (f0 va) h2 (enorm v) ->
env, h2, h2, norm v |= (∃ r : val, (f$(va, r)))

env, h2, h2, norm v |= (∃ r : val, (f$(va, r)))

va: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)
Hc: forall (pfn : val -> expr) (f : var) (x : val),
Fmap.read penv0 f = Some pfn ->
exists sfn : ufun,
  Fmap.read env f = Some sfn /\
  (forall v : val,
   tuple_valid_under penv0 env (pfn x) (sfn x v))

v: val

Hb: bigstep penv0 h2 (f0 va) h2 (enorm v)
env, h2, h2, norm v |= (f$(va, v))

env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)

Hb: bigstep penv0 h2 (f0 va) h2 (enorm v)
Hc: exists sfn : ufun,
  Fmap.read env f = Some sfn /\
  (forall v : val,
   tuple_valid_under penv0 env (f0 va) (sfn va v))
env, h2, h2, norm v |= (f$(va, v))

va: val

env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)

v: val

Hb: bigstep penv0 h2 (f0 va) h2 (enorm v)
sfn: ufun

tuple_valid_under penv0 env (f0 va) (sfn va v)
env, h2, h2, norm v |= (f$(va, v))

tuple_valid_under penv0 env (f0 va) (sfn va v)
Fmap.read env f = Some ?f

env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)

va: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)

v: val

tuple_valid_under penv0 env (f0 va) (sfn va v)

va: val
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: Fmap.fmap var (option ufun)

v: val
f0: val -> expr
Henv: Fmap.read penv0 f = Some f0
Hb: bigstep penv0 h2 (f0 va) h2 (enorm v)
sfn: ufun
H0: Fmap.read env f = Some sfn
H1: env, h2, h2, norm v |= sfn va ?TEMP0
env, h2, h2, norm v |= sfn va v

    exact H1.
  Qed.

  Local Notation derivable := forward.
  Local Notation valid := sem_tuple.

Soundness

  
forall (e : expr) (f : flow),
derivable e f -> valid e f

  
forall (e : expr) (f : flow),
derivable e f -> valid e f

    
e: expr
f: flow
H: derivable e f
valid e f

    
n: val
valid (pval n) (ens res. \[res = n])
x: var
e1, e2: expr
f1, f2: flow
v: val
H: derivable e1 f1
H0: flow_res f1 v
H1: derivable (subst x v e2) f2
IHforward1: valid e1 f1
IHforward2: valid (subst x v e2) f2
valid (plet x e1 e2) (f1;; f2)
b, e1, e2: expr
f1, f2: flow
H: derivable e1 f1
H0: derivable e2 f2
IHforward1: valid e1 f1
IHforward2: valid e2 f2
valid (pif b e1 e2) (disj f1 f2)
x: Logic.loc
valid (pderef (pval (vloc x)))
  (∀ y : Val.value,
     req (x ~~> y) (ens res. \[res = y] \* x ~~> y))
v: val
valid (pref (pval v))
  (∃ y : Logic.loc, (ens r. \[r = vloc y] \* y ~~> v))
x: Logic.loc
y: val
v: Val.value
valid (passign (pval (vloc x)) (pval y))
  (req (x ~~> v) (ens_ (x ~~> y)))
b: bool
valid (passert (pval (vbool b))) (req_ \[b = true])
vf: val
x: var
e: expr
va: val
f: flow
H: vf = vfun x e
H0: derivable (subst x va e) f
IHforward: valid (subst x va e) f
valid (papp (pval vf) (pval va)) f
vf: val
x: var
e: expr
va: val
f: flow
fn: var
H: vf = vfix fn x e
H0: derivable (subst x va (subst fn vf e)) f
IHforward: valid (subst x va (subst fn vf e)) f
valid (papp (pval vf) (pval va)) f
f: var
va: val
valid (papp (pvar f) (pval va))
  (∃ r : val, (f$(va, r)))

    
n: val
valid (pval n) (ens res. \[res = n])
 apply sem_pval.
    
x: var
e1, e2: expr
f1, f2: flow
v: val
H: derivable e1 f1
H0: flow_res f1 v
H1: derivable (subst x v e2) f2
IHforward1: valid e1 f1
IHforward2: valid (subst x v e2) f2
valid (plet x e1 e2) (f1;; f2)
 eapply sem_plet; eauto.
    
b, e1, e2: expr
f1, f2: flow
H: derivable e1 f1
H0: derivable e2 f2
IHforward1: valid e1 f1
IHforward2: valid e2 f2
valid (pif b e1 e2) (disj f1 f2)
 apply sem_pif; auto.
    
x: Logic.loc
valid (pderef (pval (vloc x)))
  (∀ y : Val.value,
     req (x ~~> y) (ens res. \[res = y] \* x ~~> y))
 apply sem_pderef.
    
v: val
valid (pref (pval v))
  (∃ y : Logic.loc, (ens r. \[r = vloc y] \* y ~~> v))
 apply sem_pref.
    
x: Logic.loc
y: val
v: Val.value
valid (passign (pval (vloc x)) (pval y))
  (req (x ~~> v) (ens_ (x ~~> y)))
 apply sem_passign.
    
b: bool
valid (passert (pval (vbool b))) (req_ \[b = true])
 apply sem_passert.
    
vf: val
x: var
e: expr
va: val
f: flow
H: vf = vfun x e
H0: derivable (subst x va e) f
IHforward: valid (subst x va e) f
valid (papp (pval vf) (pval va)) f
 eapply sem_papp_fun; eauto.
    
vf: val
x: var
e: expr
va: val
f: flow
fn: var
H: vf = vfix fn x e
H0: derivable (subst x va (subst fn vf e)) f
IHforward: valid (subst x va (subst fn vf e)) f
valid (papp (pval vf) (pval va)) f
 eapply sem_papp_fix; eauto.
    
f: var
va: val
valid (papp (pvar f) (pval va))
  (∃ r : val, (f$(va, r)))
 eapply sem_papp_unk.
  Qed.

End Soundness.

Module HistoryTriples.

  Import Soundness.

History triples
A history triple (i.e. not just a "triple", which typically refers to a Hoare triple) also constrains the history of a program. 
  Definition hist_triple fh e f :=
    forall penv env h0 h1 h2 v r,
      satisfies env h0 h1 r fh ->
      env_compatible penv env ->
      bigstep penv h1 e h2 (enorm v) ->
      satisfies env h0 h2 (norm v) f.
History triples are contravariant in the history. 
  
Proper
  (respectful (flip entails)
     (respectful eq (respectful entails impl)))
  hist_triple

  
Proper
  (respectful (flip entails)
     (respectful eq (respectful entails impl)))
  hist_triple

    
forall x y : flow,
(forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= y -> env, h1, h2, r |= x) ->
forall x0 y0 : expr,
x0 = y0 ->
forall x1 y1 : flow,
(forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (r : result),
 env, h1, h2, r |= x1 -> env, h1, h2, r |= y1) ->
(forall (penv : Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr)))
   (env : senv) (h0 h1 h2 : heap) (v : val)
   (r : result),
 env, h0, h1, r |= x ->
 env_compatible penv env ->
 bigstep penv h1 x0 h2 (enorm v) ->
 env, h0, h2, norm v |= x1) ->
forall (penv : Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : senv) (h0 h1 h2 : heap) (v : val)
  (r : result),
env, h0, h1, r |= y ->
env_compatible penv env ->
bigstep penv h1 y0 h2 (enorm v) ->
env, h0, h2, norm v |= y1

Proper
  (respectful bientails
     (respectful eq (respectful bientails impl)))
  hist_triple

  
Proper
  (respectful bientails
     (respectful eq (respectful bientails impl)))
  hist_triple

    
forall x y : flow,
bientails x y ->
forall x0 y0 : expr,
x0 = y0 ->
forall x1 y1 : flow,
bientails x1 y1 ->
(forall (penv : Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr)))
   (env : senv) (h0 h1 h2 : heap) (v : val)
   (r : result),
 env, h0, h1, r |= x ->
 env_compatible penv env ->
 bigstep penv h1 x0 h2 (enorm v) ->
 env, h0, h2, norm v |= x1) ->
forall (penv : Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : senv) (h0 h1 h2 : heap) (v : val)
  (r : result),
env, h0, h1, r |= y ->
env_compatible penv env ->
bigstep penv h1 y0 h2 (enorm v) ->
env, h0, h2, norm v |= y1

    
x, y: flow
H: bientails x y
x0, y0: expr
H0: x0 = y0
x1, y1: flow
H1: bientails x1 y1
H2: forall
  (penv : Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : senv) (h0 h1 h2 : heap) (v : val)
  (r : result),
env, h0, h1, r |= x ->
env_compatible penv env ->
bigstep penv h1 x0 h2 (enorm v) ->
env, h0, h2, norm v |= x1
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: senv
h0, h1, h2: heap
v: val
r: result
H3: env, h0, h1, r |= y
H4: env_compatible penv0 env
H5: bigstep penv0 h1 y0 h2 (enorm v)
env, h0, h2, norm v |= y1

Structural rules 
  
forall (f1 f2 f3 f4 : flow) (e : expr),
f1 ⊑ f3 ->
f4 ⊑ f2 -> hist_triple f3 e f4 -> hist_triple f1 e f2

  
forall (f1 f2 f3 f4 : flow) (e : expr),
f1 ⊑ f3 ->
f4 ⊑ f2 -> hist_triple f3 e f4 -> hist_triple f1 e f2

    
forall (f1 f2 f3 f4 : flow) (e : expr),
f1 ⊑ f3 ->
f4 ⊑ f2 ->
(forall (penv : Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr)))
   (env : senv) (h0 h1 h2 : heap) (v : val)
   (r : result),
 env, h0, h1, r |= f3 ->
 env_compatible penv env ->
 bigstep penv h1 e h2 (enorm v) ->
 env, h0, h2, norm v |= f4) ->

  (env : senv) (h0 h1 h2 : heap) (v : val)
  (r : result),

env_compatible penv env ->
bigstep penv h1 e h2 (enorm v) ->
env, h0, h2, norm v |= f2

f1, f2, f3, f4: flow
e: expr

He2: f4 ⊑ f2
H: forall
  (penv : Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr)))

    specializes H Hf1 Hc.
  Qed.

The (arbitrary) result of the history does not matter, enabling this rewriting. 
  
forall (fh f : flow) (e : expr),
hist_triple (fh;; empty) e f -> hist_triple fh e f

hist_triple (fh;; empty) e f -> hist_triple fh e f

h0, h1, h2: heap
v: val
r: result
H0: env, h0, h1, r |= fh
H1: env_compatible penv0 env
H2: bigstep penv0 h1 e h2 (enorm v)
Hseq: (exists (h3 : heap) (r1 : result),
   env, h0, h3, r1 |= fh /\
   env, h3, h1, norm vunit |= empty) ->
env, h0, h1, norm vunit |= (fh;; empty)
exists (h3 : heap) (r1 : result),
  env, h0, h3, r1 |= fh /\
  env, h3, h1, norm vunit |= empty
 
fh, f: flow
e: expr
H: forall
  (penv : Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : senv) (h0 h1 h2 : heap) (v : val)
  (r : result),
env, h0, h1, r |= (fh;; empty) ->
env_compatible penv env ->
bigstep penv h1 e h2 (enorm v) ->
env, h0, h2, norm v |= f
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: senv
h0, h1, h2: heap
v: val
r: result
H0: env, h0, h1, r |= fh
H1: env_compatible penv0 env
H2: bigstep penv0 h1 e h2 (enorm v)
Hseq: (exists (h3 : heap) (r1 : result),
   env, h0, h3, r1 |= fh /\
   env, h3, h1, norm vunit |= empty) ->
env, h0, h1, norm vunit |= (fh;; empty)
exists r1 : result,
  env, h0, h1, r1 |= fh /\
  env, h1, h1, norm vunit |= empty
 
fh, f: flow
e: expr
H: forall
  (penv : Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : senv) (h0 h1 h2 : heap) (v : val)
  (r : result),
env, h0, h1, r |= (fh;; empty) ->
env_compatible penv env ->
bigstep penv h1 e h2 (enorm v) ->
env, h0, h2, norm v |= f

env: senv
h0, h1, h2: heap
v: val
r: result
H0: env, h0, h1, r |= fh
H1: env_compatible penv0 env
H2: bigstep penv0 h1 e h2 (enorm v)
Hseq: (exists (h3 : heap) (r1 : result),
   env, h0, h3, r1 |= fh /\
   env, h3, h1, norm vunit |= empty) ->
env, h0, h1, norm vunit |= (fh;; empty)
env, h0, h1, r |= fh /\
env, h1, h1, norm vunit |= empty
 
fh, f: flow
e: expr
H: forall
  (penv : Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : senv) (h0 h1 h2 : heap) (v : val)
  (r : result),
env, h0, h1, r |= (fh;; empty) ->
env_compatible penv env ->
bigstep penv h1 e h2 (enorm v) ->
env, h0, h2, norm v |= f
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: senv
h0, h1, h2: heap
v: val
r: result
H0: env, h0, h1, r |= fh
H1: env_compatible penv0 env
H2: bigstep penv0 h1 e h2 (enorm v)
Hseq: (exists (h3 : heap) (r1 : result),
   env, h0, h3, r1 |= fh /\
   env, h3, h1, norm vunit |= empty) ->
env, h0, h1, norm vunit |= (fh;; empty)
env, h1, h1, norm vunit |= empty

      apply (empty_intro env h1). 
fh, f: flow
e: expr
H: forall
  (penv : Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : senv) (h0 h1 h2 : heap) (v : val)
  (r : result),
env, h0, h1, r |= (fh;; empty) ->
env_compatible penv env ->
bigstep penv h1 e h2 (enorm v) ->
env, h0, h2, norm v |= f
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: senv
h0, h1, h2: heap
v: val
r: result
H0: env, h0, h1, r |= fh
H1: env_compatible penv0 env
H2: bigstep penv0 h1 e h2 (enorm v)
Hseq: env, h0, h1, norm vunit |= (fh;; empty)
env, h0, h2, norm v |= f

    specializes H Hseq H1 H2.
  Qed.
History triples which only append to history can be derived directly from the history-frame rule. 
  
forall (fh : flow) (e : expr) (f : flow),
sem_tuple e f -> hist_triple fh e (fh;; f)

  
forall (fh : flow) (e : expr) (f : flow),
sem_tuple e f -> hist_triple fh e (fh;; f)

    
fh: flow
e: expr
f: flow
H: sem_tuple e f
hist_triple fh e (fh;; f)

    
fh: flow
e: expr
f: flow
H: hist_triple empty e f
hist_triple fh e (fh;; f)

    
fh: flow
e: expr
f: flow
H: hist_triple empty e f
H3: hist_triple (fh;; empty) e (fh;; f)
hist_triple fh e (fh;; f)
 
fh: flow
e: expr
f: flow
H3: hist_triple (fh;; empty) e (fh;; f)
hist_triple fh e (fh;; f)

    
fh: flow
e: expr
f: flow
H3: hist_triple fh e (fh;; f)
hist_triple fh e (fh;; f)

    exact H3.
  Qed.
Rules for program constructs 
  
forall (n : val) (fh : flow),
hist_triple fh (pval n) (fh;; (ens res. \[res = n]))

  
forall (n : val) (fh : flow),
hist_triple fh (pval n) (fh;; (ens res. \[res = n]))

    
forall (n : val) (fh : flow)
  (penv : Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : senv) (h0 h1 h2 : heap) (v : val)
  (r : result),
env, h0, h1, r |= fh ->
env_compatible penv env ->
bigstep penv h1 (pval n) h2 (enorm v) ->
env, h0, h2, norm v |= (fh;; (ens res. \[res = n]))
 
n: val
fh: flow
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: senv
h0, h1, h2: heap
v: val
r: result
Hh: env, h0, h1, r |= fh
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
Hb: bigstep penv0 h1 (pval n) h2 (enorm v)
env, h0, h2, norm v |= (fh;; (ens res. \[res = n]))

    
n: val
fh: flow
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: senv
h0, h1, h2: heap
v: val
r: result
Hh: env, h0, h1, r |= fh
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
Hb: bigstep penv0 h1 (pval n) h2 (enorm v)
exists (h3 : heap) (r1 : result),
  env, h0, h3, r1 |= fh /\
  env, h3, h2, norm v |= (ens res. \[res = n])

fh: flow
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: senv
h0, h1, h2: heap
v: val
r: result
Hh: env, h0, h1, r |= fh
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
Hb: bigstep penv0 h1 (pval n) h2 (enorm v)
exists r1 : result,
  env, h0, h1, r1 |= fh /\
  env, h1, h2, norm v |= (ens res. \[res = n])
 
n: val
fh: flow
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: senv
h0, h1, h2: heap
v: val

Hb: bigstep penv0 h1 (pval n) h2 (enorm v)
env, h0, h1, r |= fh /\
env, h1, h2, norm v |= (ens res. \[res = n])

    
n: val
fh: flow
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: senv
h0, h1, h2: heap
v: val
r: result

Hb: bigstep penv0 h1 (pval n) h2 (enorm v)

n: val
fh: flow
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: senv
h0, h1, h2: heap
v: val
r: result
Hh: env, h0, h1, r |= fh
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
Hb: bigstep penv0 h1 (pval n) h2 (enorm v)
H: tuple_valid_under penv0 env 
  (pval n) (ens res. \[res = n])
env, h1, h2, norm v |= (ens res. \[res = n])

    
n: val
fh: flow
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: senv
h0, h1, h2: heap
v: val
r: result
Hh: env, h0, h1, r |= fh
Hc: env_compatible penv0 env
Hb: bigstep penv0 h1 (pval n) h2 (enorm v)
H: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (v : val),
bigstep penv0 h1 (pval n) h2 (enorm v) ->
env, h1, h2, norm v |= (ens res. \[res = n])
env, h1, h2, norm v |= (ens res. \[res = n])

    apply H; auto.
  Qed.

  
forall (n : val) (fh : flow),
hist_triple fh (pval n) (fh;; (ens res. \[res = n]))

  
forall (n : val) (fh : flow),
hist_triple fh (pval n) (fh;; (ens res. \[res = n]))

    
n: val
fh: flow
hist_triple fh (pval n) (fh;; (ens res. \[res = n]))

    applys hist_frame_sem (@sem_pval n).
  Qed.

  
forall (v : val) (fh : flow),
hist_triple fh (pref (pval v))
  (fh;;
   (∃ y : Logic.loc, (ens r. \[r = vloc y] \* y ~~> v)))

  
forall (v : val) (fh : flow),
hist_triple fh (pref (pval v))
  (fh;;
   (∃ y : Logic.loc, (ens r. \[r = vloc y] \* y ~~> v)))

    
v: val
fh: flow
hist_triple fh (pref (pval v))
  (fh;;
   (∃ y : Logic.loc, (ens r. \[r = vloc y] \* y ~~> v)))

    applys hist_frame_sem (@sem_pref v).
  Qed.

  
forall (x : Logic.loc) (fh : flow),
hist_triple fh (pderef (pval (vloc x)))
  (fh;;
   (∀ y : Val.value,
      req (x ~~> y) (ens res. \[res = y] \* x ~~> y)))

  
forall (x : Logic.loc) (fh : flow),
hist_triple fh (pderef (pval (vloc x)))
  (fh;;
   (∀ y : Val.value,
      req (x ~~> y) (ens res. \[res = y] \* x ~~> y)))

    
x: Logic.loc
fh: flow
hist_triple fh (pderef (pval (vloc x)))
  (fh;;
   (∀ y : Val.value,
      req (x ~~> y) (ens res. \[res = y] \* x ~~> y)))

    applys hist_frame_sem (@sem_pderef x).
  Qed.

  
forall (x : Logic.loc) (y : val) (v : Val.value)
  (fh : flow),
hist_triple fh (passign (pval (vloc x)) (pval y))
  (fh;; req (x ~~> v) (ens_ (x ~~> y)))

  
forall (x : Logic.loc) (y : val) (v : Val.value)
  (fh : flow),
hist_triple fh (passign (pval (vloc x)) (pval y))
  (fh;; req (x ~~> v) (ens_ (x ~~> y)))

    
x: Logic.loc
y: val
v: Val.value
fh: flow
hist_triple fh (passign (pval (vloc x)) (pval y))
  (fh;; req (x ~~> v) (ens_ (x ~~> y)))

    applys hist_frame_sem (@sem_passign x).
  Qed.

  
forall (fh : flow) (b : bool),
hist_triple fh (passert (pval (vbool b)))
  (fh;; req_ \[b = true])

  
forall (fh : flow) (b : bool),
hist_triple fh (passert (pval (vbool b)))
  (fh;; req_ \[b = true])

    
fh: flow
b: bool
hist_triple fh (passert (pval (vbool b)))
  (fh;; req_ \[b = true])

    applys hist_frame_sem (@sem_passert b).
  Qed.

  
forall (fh : flow) (b : bool) (e1 e2 : expr)
  (f1 f2 : flow),
hist_triple (fh;; ens_ \[b = true]) e1 f1 ->
hist_triple (fh;; ens_ \[b = false]) e2 f2 ->
hist_triple fh (pif (pval (vbool b)) e1 e2)
  (disj f1 f2)

  
forall (fh : flow) (b : bool) (e1 e2 : expr)
  (f1 f2 : flow),
hist_triple (fh;; ens_ \[b = true]) e1 f1 ->
hist_triple (fh;; ens_ \[b = false]) e2 f2 ->
hist_triple fh (pif (pval (vbool b)) e1 e2)
  (disj f1 f2)

    
fh: flow
b: bool
e1, e2: expr
f1, f2: flow
He1: hist_triple (fh;; ens_ \[b = true]) e1 f1
He2: hist_triple (fh;; ens_ \[b = false]) e2 f2
hist_triple fh (pif (pval (vbool b)) e1 e2)
  (disj f1 f2)

    
fh: flow
b: bool
e1, e2: expr
f1, f2: flow
He1: hist_triple (fh;; ens_ \[b = true]) e1 f1
He2: hist_triple (fh;; ens_ \[b = false]) e2 f2
forall (penv : Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : senv) (h0 h1 h2 : heap) (v : val)
  (r : result),
env, h0, h1, r |= fh ->
env_compatible penv env ->
bigstep penv h1 (pif (pval (vbool b)) e1 e2) h2
  (enorm v) -> env, h0, h2, norm v |= disj f1 f2

  (enorm v)

fh: flow
e1, e2: expr
f1, f2: flow

He2: hist_triple (fh;; ens_ \[true = false]) e2 f2
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: senv
h0, h1, h2: heap
v: val
r: result
H: env, h0, h1, r |= fh
H0: env_compatible penv0 env
H1: bigstep penv0 h1 (pif (pval (vbool true)) e1 e2)
  h2 (enorm v)
H2: forall (P : Prop) (env : senv) (h : heap),
P -> env, h, h, norm vunit |= ens_ \[P]
env, h1, ?TEMP2, ?TEMP5 |= ens_ \[true = true]

        
fh: flow
e1, e2: expr
f1, f2: flow
He1: hist_triple (fh;; ens_ \[true = true]) e1 f1
He2: hist_triple (fh;; ens_ \[true = false]) e2 f2
penv0: Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr))
env: senv
h0, h1, h2: heap
v: val
r: result
H: env, h0, h1, r |= fh
H0: env_compatible penv0 env
H1: bigstep penv0 h1 (pif (pval (vbool true)) e1 e2)
  h2 (enorm v)
H2: forall (P : Prop) (env : senv) (h : heap),
P -> env, h, h, norm vunit |= ens_ \[P]
true = true

        reflexivity.

  (* TODO alternative formulation of if, which appends only *)
  (* TODO sem_pif should treat conditions more precisely first *)

  
forall (vf : val) (x : var) (e : expr) (va : val)
  (f fh : flow),
vf = vfun x e ->
hist_triple fh (subst x va e) f ->
hist_triple fh (papp (pval vf) (pval va)) f

  
forall (vf : val) (x : var) (e : expr) (va : val)
  (f fh : flow),
vf = vfun x e ->
hist_triple fh (subst x va e) f ->
hist_triple fh (papp (pval vf) (pval va)) f

    
vf: val
x: var
e: expr
va: val
f, fh: flow
H: vf = vfun x e
H0: hist_triple fh (subst x va e) f
hist_triple fh (papp (pval vf) (pval va)) f
 
x: var
e: expr
va: val
f, fh: flow
H0: hist_triple fh (subst x va e) f
hist_triple fh (papp (pval (vfun x e)) (pval va)) f

    
x: var
e: expr
va: val
f, fh: flow
H0: hist_triple fh (subst x va e) f
forall (penv : Fmap.fmap var (option (val -> expr)))
  (env : senv) (h0 h1 h2 : heap) (v : val)
  (r : result),
env, h0, h1, r |= fh ->
env_compatible penv env ->
bigstep penv h1 (papp (pval (vfun x e)) (pval va)) h2
  (enorm v) -> env, h0, h2, norm v |= f

forall (f : var) (va : val) (fh : flow),
hist_triple fh (papp (pvar f) (pval va))
  (fh;; (∃ r : val, (f$(va, r))))

  (fh;; (∃ r : val, (f$(va, r))))

va: val
fh: flow
hist_triple fh (papp (pvar f) (pval va))
  (fh;; (∃ r : val, (f$(va, r))))

    applys hist_frame_sem fh (@sem_papp_unk f va).
  Qed.

flow_res f1 v ->
hist_triple f1 (subst x v e2) f2 ->
hist_triple fh (plet x e1 e2) f2

hist_triple fh (plet x e1 e2) f2

    specializes He2 He1 Hc.
  Qed.

End HistoryTriples.

Module ForwardExamples.

  (* let x = 1 in x *)
  Definition e1_let := (plet "x" (pval (vint 1)) (pvar "x")).
  Definition f1 :=
    ens (fun v => \[v = vint 1]) ;;
    ens (fun r => \[r = vint 1]).

  
forward e1_let f1

  
forward e1_let f1

    
forward (pval (vint 1)) (ens v. \[v = vint 1])
flow_res (ens v. \[v = vint 1]) ?v
forward (subst "x" ?v (pvar "x"))
  (ens r. \[r = vint 1])

    
forward (pval (vint 1)) (ens v. \[v = vint 1])
 apply fw_val.
    
flow_res (ens v. \[v = vint 1]) ?v
 
forall (h1 h2 : heap) (env : senv) (v1 : val),
env, h1, h2, norm v1 |= (ens v. \[v = vint 1]) ->
v1 = ?v

      
h1, h2: heap
env: senv
v1: val
H: env, h1, h2, norm v1 |= (ens v. \[v = vint 1])
v1 = ?v

      
h1, h2: heap
env: senv
v1: val
H: v1 = vint 1 /\ h1 = h2
v1 = ?v

      
h1, h2: heap
env: senv
v1: val
H: v1 = vint 1
H0: h1 = h2
v1 = ?v

      exact H.
    
forward (subst "x" (vint 1) (pvar "x"))
  (ens r. \[r = vint 1])
 
forward (pval (vint 1)) (ens r. \[r = vint 1])

      apply fw_val.
  Qed.

End ForwardExamples.

Correspondence with the paper

Section 2.1. A Simple Example

In the file Hello.v. An additional example, which demonstrates preventing the use of a function argument which captures one of the input pointers, is included.

Section 2.2. foldr

In the file Foldr.v. Entailments foldr_sum and foldr_sum_state are both proved, as are those of the three examples which are difficult to handle with the conventional foldr specification from the introduction.
The first one does require a separate heap-manipulating definition of foldr; the others can be adapted to use it as well, at the cost of clarity and brevity of proofs.
The proof of the third one cannot be finished without a semantics for exceptions, which we do not cover in this paper.

Section 3.1. Semantics of staged formulae

The semantics of staged formulae is given as satisfies.
There are a number of differences from the paper:
  • An environment is added to give interpretations for unknown functions (a similar one is added to the big-step semantics)
  • Stores are removed to sidestep impredicativity problems, and replaced with substitution
  • The definition of req is different, restoring its contravariance

Section 3.2. Compaction

Compaction is really just entailment, so soundness (Theorem 1) is ensured by construction.
The six rules in Fig 7:
  • norm_ens_false_l
  • norm_empty_l
  • norm_empty_r
  • norm_req_req
  • norm_ens_ens_void_l
  • norm_ens_req_transpose
A definition of biabduction is given and proved sound with respect to heap entailment.

Section 4. Forward rules

The reasoning rules for programs are first presented as a more primitive relation forward between programs and staged formulae, without history. The validity of these rules for each program construct is defined as a collection of semantic tuples sem_tuple (analogous to semantic triples), and soundness (Theorem 2) is explicitly proved, under a new env_compatible condition.
History triples (Fig 8) are then defined. Many of the resulting rules can be derived from semantic tuples using the structural history-frame rule hist_frame. History triples are also defined semantically and are hence sound by construction.
Other differences from the paper:
  • The assert rule takes a value (or expression, under ANF), not a heap formula. No expressiveness is lost as it's still possible to assert things about the content of heap locations by first reading them.
  • The fun/fix rules require function specifications to be given via triples, instead of via annotations in the syntax. An annotation can still be given by proving a lemma giving the function body a specification beforehand.
  • The let rule substitutes (a symbolic value) into the program, instead of quantifying free variables
  • The value of the location that deref retrieves is universally quantified, to match the new definition for req

Section 5. Entailment

Entailment is defined semantically, so soundness (Theorem 3) is ensured by construction.
The two entailment rules in the main paper
  • entails_ens_seq
  • entails_req_seq
and the additional rules from Appendix G
  • entails_func
  • entails_disj_right_l
  • entails_disj_right_r
  • entails_disj_left
are shown to be sound. The separation logic rules are the standard ones from SLF.
In practice, entailment proofs of interesting (higher-order/recursive) programs involve giving unknown functions specific interpretations using an environment. They thus involve the entails_under sequent and use lemmas with the ent_ prefix instead. Manipulating such sequents neccessitates a significant number of new lemmas.

Appendix D. Intersection

This section is really about the completeness of biabduction. The main paper elides the case where two locations may not be known to be equal. A more complete definition is given as b_pts_diff/b_pts_diff_single, which works even without a known disquality between x and y.
Intersection (conjunction lifted to staged formulae) is an orthogonal concern. The example from the paper is proved correct using it in ex3_intersection.
